You can see it in Blossom too. The frequency of posts showing the portfolio gains (as I posted yesterday) is slowing. Many of our frequent posters......are posting less. Many of our traders are frozen making moves to compensate for the increased volatility that isn't always going their way ($CME). Some Blossomers have gone ghost.

And who better than to blame.....than TRUMP! He certainly is shaking things up!!!! But if you know the real estate/banking crisis cycle, you know IT DOESN'T MATTER WHO THE PRESIDENT IS. And this TIME will be no exception.

Trump ultimately will be a victim of the cycle - as all previous presidents that serve during the peak in real estate prices. And he will fall into the same trap - as all prior to him - to TRY AND BREAK THE CYCLE. But he can't.....and he won't. The dark days are coming for the USA and the rest of the world......until the reset is complete - as always. That's why TRUMP wants another 4-year term following this one (his appearances look like a campaign trail, eh?)

But the writing is on the wall. And it's been there since 1776.....on TIME, every TIME. You just never looked. It doesn't matter who the President is.....or what they do. The American real estate/banking crisis cycle will peak as it always does - then elevator drop.....to a reset that starts again. This isn't the type of event you're proud to hold through market volatility. This is the kind of market event that wipes you out. As in you got nothin' in your portfolio anymore. You ready to listen to Conventionalists tell you how "great" it is? How DCA is so wonderful. Why not catch a falling knife? Time in the market is better than TIMING the market. Hold the line!!!! Only to watch them start eating sour grapes - which will turn into anger and finger pointing. Hey! They live in a world of averages......so they get exactly what they deserve!

Those days are still a ways off yet......and it will all be masked by stock market euphoria and amazing wealth creation in these final stages - as if nothing could ever go wrong again - as we head into these final stages of the meltup phase of the real estate/banking crisis cycle. But only a fool would think that the most powerful in the world aren't aware of the cycle, it's consequences, and the TIMING of it.

TRUMP deserves credit though. Like him or not. What he is attempting is akin to pulling a rabbit out of a hat. It's never worked before. Yes, I used the word "never" and I know the weight of it. The only events that have proven to break the real estate/banking crisis cycle is war. And while economic war, cutting deep sea cables for communication and energy supply, building strategic islands in the middle of the ocean, geopolitical "skirmishes" testing drones and other new war machines are in that category, it's not the full stop military offensive that can take the real estate/banking crisis cycle down.......yet.

TRUMP is attempting to ward off the most severe economic collapse in history (each cycle gets stronger gains, deeper recessions). It has its roots in the1970s when Modern Monetary Theory (MMT) found it's roots and we abandoned the gold standard - a reserve of hard specie that backs fiat (paper) money. Instead, the USA has proceeded on a 50-year path with a belief that governments with sovereign currency can simply print as much money as needed to obtain any services or goods needed or desired by its citizens. In other words....the central bank justs prints as much as they want. This liberal monetary policy is embraced by Bernie Sanders and you can learn more about MMT and the latest "face" of the academic argument is professor Stephanie Kelton.

But here's the reality. That only works when someone buys the debt. Over the past four years, major efforts have been taken to quit using the US Dollar as a standard. BRICS (Brazil, Russia, India, China, South Africa, Egypt, Ethiopia, Indonesia, Iran and the United Arab Emirates) have banded together to eliminate the dollar. Several energy transactions made with yuan instead of the "petrodollar" Major holders are dumping their holdings of US Treasuries and central banks around the world are accumulating as much gold as possible while promoting a crypto ecosystem independent of the US Dollar.

So you are getting your wish, Canada. But if you think there's a world that exists where Canada thrives while the USA languishes, you haven't thought about it enough. Go ahead and direct your anger at Trump. But he is doing what he thinks is best to save his country. Because this is what's brewing:
(1) The US national debt hit $36 TRILLION in November 2024 after hitting $35 TRILLION in July 2024.
(2) Interest costs NOW EXCEED NEARLY EVERY LINE ITEM IN THE BUDGET. (When do you think you will pay off your credit card balance if you can't even pay the interest every month?)
(3) The federal budget deficit in FY2024 was the 3rd largest in history and at nearly $2 TRILLION last year.....most all experts warn that the government needs to reign in the deficit to ensure fiscal stability.

So go ahead and bitch about Tariffs, DOGE, and other TRUMP policy. But who can possibly blame a leader that is trying to right the wrongs listed above? Let's step back and make some market observations:
(1) Historical P/E of the market is about 15-16. Today it's ~35. More than twice. So when will we have the reversion to the mean? Ask the cycle.
(2) No one is buying US bonds like they used too. The Fed is keeping it alive....but we need others or start collecting revenues from them.
(3) Gold is being gobbled up everywhere. For years now, central banks are buying all they can. Even $COST is opportunistic in selling it to retail.
(4) Commerical Real Estate is cracking. Collateralized debt obligations (CDOs - bundles of shitty debt) just hit an all-time high of $200 BILLION. Worse yet, PRIVATE EQUITY ASSET MANAGEMENT is now over $335 BILLION. This is going to be a monumental collapse and cycle reset.
(5) We are witnessing a race to who can accumulate the most debt. Mortgage-backed securities are alive and well........as long as real estate prices remain high.
(6) Pension funds are on an inevitable path of financial insolvency.
(7) De-dollarization is increasing and the war is coming ever closer into view since building aggressively over the last two decades.

So TRUMP is trying. But it won't matter. Because while his efforts for the country are genuine, he also can't avoid his profit-minded nature. And he will fall into the same pits as all previous.....by procrastinating the cycle's end......which is a market for the final stages of the meltup before the inevitable. This government intervention happens every TIME and is built into the TIMING of the real estate/banking crisis cycle. So here's the Trump mistakes going forward that you can expect to see soon - that will only serve to fuel the fire higher.......and make it much, much worse. Sorry TRUMP. FACTS!
(1) Already talk of $1,400 stimulus checks in 2025. More money into economy and markets.
(2) Make tax cuts permanent AND further cut taxes. More money into economy and markets.
(3) DOGE Dividends - Already talk of returing SOME of the DOGE savings to citizens (~10%) and the rest towards the massive debt.
(4) Huge increases in defense spending. Other governments will stimulate too. Germany and EU announced massive stimulus. Have to think China will do something similar (if not already). Japan announce it - Canada too. Did I ever tell you about one of my favorite holdings $MHVYF . They announced 40% hiring in their industrial defense division. 40%!?!?!?
(5) Virtually everything TRUMP will do will be inflationary. And inflation is captured in land prices. Trump is a real estate man......not as much a business man. So are the people in power - banks and governments. They ARE THE LAND OWNERS. So while they know what's coming.....they also know they will benefit. When most people are land owners and they know the measures will translate into land valuation, there is little incentive not to ride it out and profit off the rest. Ugh....and sad. With less checks and balances on government, nobody is there to speak out.

Oh shit - so what's the plan, Beskar? Well.....the best advice is to stay connected. I will continue to provide a real-TIME "play by play". As long as the land price keeps increasing, banks make credit readily available, and governments stimulate..........then we are going to juice these mutha fukin' markets to the brink! A dangerous and exciting house of cards with amazing returns ahead.........until.

Once we see the government offering new programs to get those that can least afford home ownership into mortgages.....then we'll know that the land price peak valuation is very near. They will be the ones that get burned to a crisp. At that TIME, we can expect the S&P500 to peak soon thereafter (months of TIME) and then banks to pull the credit carpet out from everyone. So for those that want to TIME the markets....we plan to ride these thrilling waves until they crest. Then, we check out with our future downpayment for a late 2027-2028 property purchase. It will be difficult for most to get a loan in those dark days.....so we need to build the coffers in these final stages of the GREATEST PERIOD OF WEALTH CREATION IN STOCK MARKET HISTORY (2010 - ????).

What else? Select commodities will continue to perform for a good amount of TIME (many, many months) following the peak in indicies. So RIGHT STOCKS, RIGHT TIME will always work. And so will shorting, buying puts. Per script, the Americas go first, awhile later Europe tanks (hard to believe even further than what it's been doing), and then the Far East (same), including Australia and India, SE Asia, etc. But all of this will take TIME.

Have you noticed all the negative talk on economic growth, market fears? And how's oil doing? $70 per barrel!?!?!? Gold at all time highs? Coffee off the charts. Copper flying high again. Natural gas? Food stocks? Miners? Are you getting it yet?

Attached are some charts now that we learned our FRED source.
(1) M2 (cash) slope is increasing at highest rate. That MONEY IS DEFINITELY GOING TO PLOW BACK IN TO MARKETS. It always does. Remember, the market tops when NO ONE is left to doubt it's perpetual climb anymore. VIX is low, not high. So plenty of liquidity coming with savings and government stimulus in the final stages of the meltup!
(2) Dollar weakening. I included a chart of $UDN and $UUP , which are juiced ETFs on Bearish Dollar vs. Bullish Dollar. You can see the clear and obvious inverse correlation. The divergence between the two is at a historical high. So guess what's in store for the upcoming future. Weak dollar is great for commodities like OIL and others.
(3) I included $GCC ETF to demonstrate the whole commodity basket space. Make sure to check out the end of the last real estate/banking crisis cycle and the recent technical movements since 2024 (Remember when I posted my first Blossom post - still the greatest in Blossom history - titled "They are telling us so what are you waiting for?" Shhh.....make sure you bookmarked that one.....you'll understand why later! A reward for reading through all of this post!). Also, you may find my post KTS #18 and #2 worth a re-read at this TIME.

So let's enjoy this rally into May!!!! Here come all of the ROTH IRA, SMALL BUSINESS RETIREMENT Contributions before tax day on April 15th.....not to mention all of the M2 money as the fear burns off again! This is a TIME to BUY, BUY, BUY the RIGHT STOCKS at the RIGHT TIME......until the TIME comes to BYE, BYE, BYE!

I continue to give you my best......even if you don't like the idea of TRUMP being a victim.

Learn to read and listen to markets to TIME them.

This is the Way!

title: Knowledge Transfer Series #68 - FRED
caption:
Yabba-Dabba-Doo!

Returning from our family spring break vacation in beautiful South Carolina 😎 ⛱️ and owe you a few Knowledge Transfer posts (every +100 new followers). So let's get right after it!

As we expected, the wolves will be spending the first 6 months of 2025 trying to identify the winning and losing stocks from new policy in a presidential change with increased volatility. As that continues to play out, the next three posts will be checking in on the real estate/banking crisis cycle as we proceed through the meltup phase of it.

Before we present today's tool, it is mandatory that ALL previous Beskar posts shown below with links be read and properly digested! 😂 If not, then don't be surprised when you don't understand going forward. Many of the back half of the first 100 Knowledge Transfer Series posts are 200-level information and many require more philosophical/psychological understanding and strategic thoughts vs. applied mathematical science. Think qualitative vs. quantitative! 😉 A world that is completely foreign to Conventionalist Investors whose simple minds can only go as far as the annualized return of an index fund. They will make bullshit assumed comments about "TIME in the Market is more important than TIMING the market" or "Everyone knows that no one can TIME the market" or mock interim market movements to the big picture TIMING as some sort of misread.

🎶 🎵 That's just the way it is
Some things will never change
That's just the way it is
Ah, but don't you believe them. 🎶 🎵

So here's the preface posts from 6 to 12 months ago that MUST be READ before getting started:

They are telling us so what are you waiting for? (1 year ago):
https://share.blossomsocial.com/12qrfXc1gacne3qH9

Knowledge Transfer Series #38 – Read the Cycle 1 of 3:
https://share.blossomsocial.com/jNzFmXfBUbEfBRUt6
 
Knowledge Transfer Series #39 – Read the Cycle 2 of 3:
https://share.blossomsocial.com/SAtPAnYz1ybsA9z16
 
Knowledge Transfer Series #40 – Read the Cycle 3 of 3:
https://share.blossomsocial.com/YuEC5s6vt4rmDfP46
 
Check in With the Cycle:
https://share.blossomsocial.com/efez7ihtspXs74TB7
 
Tale of Two:
https://share.blossomsocial.com/t1oHNz5L8ixM2Dva8
 
What a wonderful refresher!!! 😃👍🤑

Now let's get in to today's tool, which we will slowly work into our preparation for the peak of the real estate/banking crisis cycle! Let's go!

The FED.

It's a skill to develop.....to not pay much attention whatsoever to their daily past/current member interviews, forecasts, or latest reported numbers. A lot of noise there......and ALWAYS. In typical Beskar fashion, I'm asking you to focus on the TOTALITY OF THE DATA by ZOOMING OUT and OBSERVING/ANALYZING the TREND WITHIN THE REAL ESTATE/BANKING CRISIS CYCLE INSTEAD. 😄👍

Why? There's always noise. Sure January economic activity was down.....it was cold....and people stayed home. Then Bank of America tells us last week that spending in February was UP 6.6% Year-over-Year. Noise, noise, noise. Oil prices up.....oil prices down. AI investment up....AI investment down. Housing sales up......housing sales down. Core up.....PCE down. Get it!?!??!?! They are confusing you aren't they? 🤪😅

That's why we step back and use Fed trend charts instead and watch how they monitor the worst scenarios. 📊 📈 📉

Our sources? FRED. https://fred.stlouisfed.org

This is the Federal Reserve Economic Data warehouse.
While we monitor inflation rates at the Cleveland Federal Reserve and national bank stress tests at the home base, we go to St. Louis for a repository of readily accessible datasets that help us confirm news flows to identify the phase and stage of the real estate/banking crisis cycle. Read the previous sentence 10x! 😂

So think of it as a crystal ball of sorts. 🔮 Take that, Conventionalists! 💥

I will go into more of this in great detail as we progress through the Knowledge Transfer Series to help you sleep well at night by investing in the RIGHT STOCKS at the RIGHT TIME!

I can only attach four charts so we'll start our journey with these! Note that GREY AREAS ON THESE FRED CHARTS ARE RECESSIONS.

First, let's look at the Rental Vacancy Rate in the US. Whenever this metric starts climbing, we climb into a recession. Current status, we finally broke the downward trend in 2023 since the last real estate/banking crisis recession ended in 2010......and are now climbing again. So you know what's coming soon, right? 😅

Second chart: Consumer Credit Card Balances. Whoa! Around the same TIME that Rental Vacancy rates began to climb......Total Credit Card Balances in the US broke their all-time high and have been screaming higher. Confirmation that the economy is.....well......"stretched".🥵

This is fun, Beskar!!! 😅 What's next?

Third chart: Delinquency Rate on Commercial Real Estate (CRE) Loans. This one goes back two real estate/banking crisis cycles. The takeaway? Whenever this metric rises, it leads to a recession. Additionally, it appears THE LONGER THE PERIOD OF TIME THAT IT IS RISING, THE MORE SEVERE THE RECESSION. While there is limited data to make such an assertion, it does comply with logic as preventative measures to procrastinate the inevitable will build to make the problem much worse. If true, this is going to make the recession in 2008-2010 look relatively mild. In the interest of the long run......we actually wouldn't mind to start seeing CRE blowups start accelerating sooner than later (remember from previous posts May and October are ideal blow up months historically). Sad, but true. And this TIME we have a new house of cards - private equity asset management. We will just watch in amazement when this top blows off!!!! 🌋 😅🤢😭

Last chart is most important: The Case-Schiller U.S. National Home Price Index. When this starts to level off, you better get your house in order! And again.....the longer the run up.....but also the magnitude of the run up......foreshadows the period and severity of the dark days that will follow. 🤢😡 So let's just say.....God Bless America on this one!

The real estate/banking crisis cycle will complete on TIME.

And the stage of the meltup phase is confirmed with FRED data and the news flow. While some of you may be panicked after reading this.......this is NOT the TIME to abandon the equity markets if your goal is to be "IN THE MARKET" when it's in a period of long-time climb. Because as long as banks are handing out credit and governments are pouring in liquidity in measures to stave off the inevitable.....these mutha fukin' markets are going to the moon. 😅🤣😂

Per script, this will blow out when no one thinks it actually will anymore. That's a characteristic that dates back to 1819. If you have what it takes, let's ride these massive waves despite the ever-increasing RIP currents that are set to take you out to sea and never make it back to shore. Just don't fall off the surfboard!!! 😱🤮

We will continue to build on this knowledge transfer in future posts as we get closer by identifying the RIGHT STOCKS at the RIGHT TIME as we progress through the stages of the meltup phase. Speculation is here and now. It will burn all in the end.....but for those that TIME it, right? You'll never go back to that Conventional poison. 😂

I always give you my best. 😁🤑👍

This is the Way! 🏄‍♂️ 🌊 🏄‍♀️ 🌊

title: Trump Getting What He Wants Continues
caption:
https://www.reuters.com/business/energy/indias-bpcl-plans-buy-us-oil-via-4-mth-tender-source-says-2025-03-07/

India’s state-owned refiner Bharat Petroleum Corporation Limited (BPCL) prepares to issue a tender to buy U.S. WTI crude in four consecutive months this summer, a source with knowledge of the plans told Reuters on Friday.

Indian refiners are looking to boost U.S. crude imports to diversify purchases, as the availability of non-sanctioned Russian supply has diminished in recent weeks. India also aims to increase its imports of energy from the United States as it wants to avoid tariffs which President Donald Trump is announcing or suspending every other day.

BPCL will now seek to buy 1 million barrels of WTI Crude every month for four months for arrival starting from May or June, according to the Reuters source. The four-month tender is expected to be issued next week.

BPCL and other Indian refiners regularly buy U.S. crude oil. Last year, BPCL awarded a similar deal to BP for delivery of U.S. crude.

After a meeting between President Trump and Indian Prime Minister Narendra Modi in Washington in February, India’s Foreign Secretary Vikram Misri said that his country could raise its imports of U.S. energy to $25 billion annually, from around $15 billion last year.

India imported a lot of American crude in 2021, but its imports dropped in the 2022-2024 period as Indian refiners turned to the cheap Russian oil which no one in the West wanted or was allowed to buy.

This dynamic has recently changed. India is set to receive U.S. oil volumes at a two-year high, while Russian volumes have slumped to a two-year low, following the January U.S. sanctions on Russia’s oil trade.

The United States is estimated to have exported in February the highest crude oil volumes to India in more than two years, at 357,000 barrels per day (bpd), as Indian refiners scramble for alternative supply.

title: New Position in McCoy Global
Knowledge Transfer Series #67 - Dividend Rights
caption:
You know the routine.

Another 100+ followers means.....grab your coffee, find a comfy chair, and read your latest Knowledge Transfer Series post. Life is good! 😅👍

Today is my one-year birthday to the day on Blossom. Hard to believe after all of this knowledge that's been transferred...........it's only been 365 days on this site. 🎂 🥳 🎉 🎈 🎊

So today I am giving YOU a VERY SPECIAL gift to mark the anniversary. 🎁

Why is it special? Because NO ONE talks about today's financial phenomenon! Nobody. Nada. Nothing. Not even dividend-exclusive investors. No pros, no talk shows, no retirement specialists, no financial advisers....or advisors. No analysts. No companies. Nobody. But before we begin, I know you've prepped yourself for the back half of the KTS being 200-level knowledge.......but I really need you to focus today.......because this post WILL CHANGE YOUR RELATIONSHIP WITH MONEY.....and your financial life overall. 🤑

You're killing me, Beskar 😅😂.......what is it today????

Dividend Rights.

Following on KTS #66, Compounding Rights, today we are going to prove out some golden insight.....that most don't really know about......and even if they do.....they don't share about it.

So let's get the basic definitions out of the way first:

Dividend Yield:  Estimated annual dividend based on the latest regular interim dividend amount times the frequency of the dividend. This is expressed as a percentage of annualized return. 👍

Dividend Rate:  Sum of dividends paid during the previous 12 month rolling period. This is expressed in dollars. 👍

Next, the mathematical relationship between the two is straightforward. The Dividend Rate divided by the CURRENT Share Price equals the Dividend Yield.
Easy enough? So....let's get our basic insight ingrained in the membrane first.
KEY INSIGHT: Because the current share price is changing constantly on the open market, therefore.........THE ANNUAL DIVIDEND YIELD IS CHANGING BY THE SECOND. 📈

Read the KEY INSIGHT above again......and again. 😅

Ok, got it, Beskar!

Now, let's assume Ava decides on Monday to make a $1,000 investment in a stock that has a current share price of $10.00 per share and an annual dividend rate of $1.00 per share.....for a current annualized dividend yield of 10%. So she buys 100 shares. Easy enough.

When dividend paying stocks experience quick drops in share price during flush outs of weak money in these abrupt ~10% market turndowns within bull markets, the annualized dividend yield can skyrocket in comparison to it's "typical" dividend yield range. READ THIS PREVIOUS SENTENCE AGAIN. AGAIN. AGAIN. AGAIN. 😅🤣😂

Why is this important? Because you can lock in a guaranteed outperformance of the market indicies......if in the right stocks.......FOREVER.......at these key moments. Do you realize how powerful this statement is? 🤑🤑🤑

So let's prove it to ourselves.

OK....so we already covered Ava's strategic move into stock XYZ on Monday. Now, let's say a day later, Will decides follow Ava into Stock XYZ after they reported extremely positive earnings and Stock XYZ jumps up in share price to $20.00 with the same investment amount of $1,000. The moment Will invests the same amount, $1,000, however, this capital only gets him 50 shares at the $20.00 share price. Also, Will buying at this point gives him an annualized dividend yield of 5% by the calculation above......which, though only 1 day later, is half of what Ava locked in the day before. SEE THE FIRST ATTACHED TABLE BELOW.
Now, at the end of the year, Ava receives $100.00 in dividend payments while Will only receives $50.00........despite that Ava held the stock just 1 day longer than Will. Of course the stock doubling in one day is extreme......but using round numbers and distinctly different entry points to illustrate the phenomenon. Again, THE MOMENT YOU BUY A DIVIDEND PAYING STOCK, YOU LOCK IN THE CURRENT ANNUALIZED DIVIDEND YIELD......FOR LIFE (assuming the dividend doesn't get cut, which is the case if you pick the right stocks like aristocrats, kings, and increasing free cash flows covered in KTS #65). Take the TIME to understand what that really means. I said.....take the TIME to understand what that REALLY means. 🤔🤫

So if an already high-dividend paying stock flash crashes on a DOW/NASDAQ/S&P500 down 800 points kind of day.......and the current dividend yield skyrockets to 15% because of the flash drop in share price.......it really means that you LOCK IN 15% annual return in DIVIDENDS ALONE for the life of that original investment.......as long as you continue to hold those shares and KEEP YOUR DIVIDEND RIGHTS. You get it, right? You know that S&P500 can only average single-digit annualized returns (<10% per year average) for your lifetime, right? But if you TIME it just right.....when the wolves are throwing a temper tantrum, you can BUY SUPERIOR DIVIDEND YIELD......FOR THE REST OF YOUR LIFE! And that is assuming NO CAPITAL GAINS from stock price appreciation. A 15% annualized yield for life outperforms the S&P500. Do yourself a favor and calculate by what percentage you are guaranteed to outperform the S&P500? If that's 10% per year.....and your dividend strategy is 15% per year.......what's that really mean?🤫🤔

Oh geez, Beskar..... can this be real?!?!?!

Let's keep working down the table to prove it out. So let's say a year later, Emma comes into stock XYZ, which is now increased in share price to $100.00 per share. $1,000 bucks buys her 10 shares. Remember, Will still holds 50 shares and Ava holds 100 shares......also with $1,000 investments in stock XYZ. But Emma's 10 shares are still just a 1.25% dividend yield. Will is 5% dividend yield. Ava is 10% dividend yield. Pretty different even though they all invested $1,000, eh? 😅

So now let's assume that all 3 of them then decide to continue to hold for the next 5 years while the stock drops from $100.....to $50.....to $25.....to $20. All the while, Ava exercising her DIVIDEND RIGHTS by just holding those shares of Stock XYZ. But Ava gets 10% every year, Will gets 5%, Emma gets 1.25%.

So let's check in after 7 years.......how's it going? Look at the bottom of the table.
When figuring in that stocks go up and down.....but that all rock solid stocks RISE in PRICE over the long-term, we see that:
Ava has an annualized return of 24.3%....that's average PER YEAR! 🤑🤑🤑
Will has an annualized return of 5%.......average PER YEAR!
and Emma has an annualized return of -10.6% when you factor in her UNrealized losses.

Did the light bulb go off in your head yet? It should have. 😅🤣😂

This is why you really need to think twice before selling a stock that pays dividends.......because when you do.....you give up your DIVIDEND RIGHTS. And that's a BBBBIIIIIIGGGGG ASK! 😡

Remember when Warren Buffett proclaimed no one could beat the S&P500? Well now you know that if you TIME it just right and BUY in a flash crash.......you can LOCK IN OUTPERFORMING THE S&P500.......FOR THE REST OF YOUR LIFE!🤑🤑🤑

Absolutely mind-numbing insight, isn't it?😄

And this example of Ava, Will, and Emma just assumed that the DIVIDEND RATE was held constant. What would it look like if Stock XYZ even raised the dividend modestly? CHECK OUT THE SECOND TABLE ATTACHED TO SEE THE EFFECT OF THAT on their purchases:
Ava averages 31.8% every year.
Will 8.8% every year.
Emma - 9.8% every year.

WOW! Big WOW! 😳

Now the DIVIDEND RIGHTS COMPOUND as the company increases the DIVIDEND RATE over TIME.

Imagine buying $ET at $6.00 per share with a dividend yield of 12%? I certainly can. 😂 And now you know......no matter how smart a Conventionalist is.......they can NEVER outperform this investment....starting now or forever. Every year......I am receiving way more than 12% on that original investment.....as they continually raise the dividend.🤑

So yes......we embrace healthy ~10% corrections in bull markets.🤑 And when panic is highest😱......we have a shortlist of high yielding stocks that reach stratospheric current dividend yields for just a relative moment in TIME......that gives us the opportunity to LOCK IN A ROCK SOLID STOCK 💪 with GUARANTEED OUTPERFORMANCE OF THE S&P500 for the remainder of your beating heart. ❤️ 😅

Do you really understand this phenomenon?🤫🤔 Now that we proved it out.......don't you wonder why no one shares this with the masses? 😅😂

I told you this is next level. Enjoy the meat......FOREVER. 😅😍🤑

This is the Way! 🏄‍♂️ 🌊 🏄‍♀️ 🌊

title: Knowledge Transfer Series #66 - Compounding Rights
caption:
Just print it! 😂

Seriously, fire up that old HP dinosaur and print this one. You'll want to check each number and figure out how it got there. 😉👍

One of the most powerful forces in nature that even Einstein acknowledged ....... is Compounding Rights!😅

That's right Blossomers......I see you.....you buy a stock.....quick turnaround.....make a fast buck....equals......INSTANT INCOME! 🤑🤑🤑

And not knocking that by any means....especially in this volatile market that we expect to continue for the first half of 2025 while the wolves figure out who the winners and losers are from Trump policy. But - for certain stocks - those that are climbing and still recording and within 5% of their 52-wk highs.....on path to make newer highs....in a series of higher highs, higher lows on their stock charts.....it's TIME to consider a stealthy accumulation instead.

Today, I highlight an absolute gem of a stock right now, Rolls Royce, $RYCEY . Cars is the LAST business unit you should think about with these guys. 😅 Instead, they are a major European defense company (Trump just gave them the keys to Ukraine) with submarines drones, and fighter planes, cruise & airplane turbine engine suppliers, and both natural gas turbine supplier and nuclear small module reactor producer for the massive buildout of data centers worldwide. So basically a great BUY!😉🤑

But using this stock as an example for so many others in key sectors ( 😉 ), to demonstrate the power of compounding rights and the sacrifice of successfully TIMED income strategies.

So it's a square off of BUY & HOLD IN BULL MARKETS vs. BUY & TRADE FOR INCOME.
Before you just jump in on the images below, this one requires following each row as we go! (Did you print out (or electronically capture) the attachments yet?😅

It's OK.....I'll wait. Just do it!.....and grab a hot coffee while you're at it. This is going to be fun! 😃🤑

Ready? Let's go!

Two Investors: BUY &TRADER FOR INCOME and BUY & HOLD IN BULL MARKETS Think @cocolove and @beskar_capital . Sorry Anne😊....you know I love your moves....I just need to use the most representative Blossomer for that style......you win! Seriously, I'm dedicating this KTS to you 👍 as a consideration for some of the stocks in your portfolio.....I saw your meltdown the other day as you started to question your strategy. You know I want you to WIN! 🏆

As we have been doing with many penny stocks over the past year, let's say both types of INVESTORS used KTS #23 (maybe re-read KTS #10/#10A too!) effectively (broke the declining trend and held above it around $0.75 - see RED ARROW) to TIME their entry into $RYCEY as it crossed over that key $1.00 price level. For those that have been following KTS since the beginning, we know that this is not a complicated or particularly difficult thing to TIME. That would have been 9/28/2022. Let's say both investors opened an initial position with a $10,000 investment......which at $1.00......is 10,000 shares (ok, ok for younger investors, just use $1,000 and subtract a "0" all through this example to make it real for you if needed!). 😄

Now, over the course of the next little over 2 years, BUY & HOLD THRU BULL just sits on those 10,000 shares as Rolls.......rolls! Over the same period, let's watch how BUY & TRADE FOR INCOME successfully TIMES key points for IN and OUT of the stock (See PURPLE ARROWS in chart for SELLS and BLUE ARROWS in chart for BUYS). Looking at the chart.....amazing performance by BUY & TRADE FOR INCOME ....... hitting those inflection points with regular success......a MASTER of TIMING! 🤑👍

Let's dig in on that performance.......within less than 6 months, BUY & TRADE extracted $4,000 of income out of Rolls. Then, BUY & TRADE recycles that original $10,000 of capital back into the stock in July 2023 and spends that $4k!!! Sweet!!!!! 🤑🤑🤑
This TIME, that $10,000 recycled investment gets him 5,263 shares (because the BUY price is now $1.90). By August of 2023, BUY & TRADE unloads those 5,263 shares to realize another ~$4,200 of income extracted.....an accumulated total of ~$8,200 in less than one year!!!🤑🤑🤑

Just over one year.....now BUY & TRADE continues to perfect those entries and exits.....resulting in $14,460.53 out of Rolls Royce !?!?!??! Talk about supplemental income for little effort! The success carries on through 2024 as the stock continues it's steady climb......going in and out at the right TIME.....to the point that by early March 2025.....BUY & TRADE has accumulated nearly $28,000 of income out of Rolls Royce with this recycled $10,000 investment capital. 🤑🤑🤑

No doubt.......by any measure......that's a WIN!!!!!! 🏆 Conventionalists can never realize this kind of profits over TIME. NEVER. 😅🤣😂

But what about BUY & HOLD THROUGH BULL? What did he do during that TIME period? BUY & TRADE looks over his shoulder to see. BUY & TRADE sitting with his $10,000 of original recycled investment.....PLUS ~$28k in INCOME!!!!! What do you have BUY & HOLD THROUGH BULL? BUY & HOLD THROUGH BULL responds......I have ZERO INCOME and 10,000 shares of $RYCEY . At first, BUY & TRADE is satisfied how he "played" it for income. 🤭🤑 But then.......... he broke out his calculator to figure out that BUY & HOLD THROUGH BULL was sitting on $105,000 with his 10,000 shares at the current share price of $10.50 !?!?!! 😳

BUY & TRADE FOR INCOME couldn't believe it. Sure B&TFI pulled out $28k out of nothing, spent it on some awesome concerts and a few week long trips.....but B&HTB was sitting on $95k of profit......while still holding 10,000 shares. B&TFI had no shares anymore.
That night, B&TFI couldn't sleep......tossing and turning🥵......having dreams about how B&HTB was sitting......pure jealousy! The next morning, B&TFI woke up.....went right to the brokerage site.....in pure FOMO frantic........determined to reinvest that recycled $10,000 original capital in $RYCEY and just hold it like B&HTB was.........brewed coffee, pulled up chair to desk, logged in,........and what happened......$RYCEY share price was now $10.82!🥹......up another 32 cents from the day before! 😳 B&TFI quickly broke out his calculator, punched in B&HTB's 10,000 shares......multiplied by......$10.82 share price......equals......$108,200! 😵‍💫 Holy crap! "BUY AND HOLD THROUGH BULL just made another $3,082 in unrealized gains OVERNIGHT while I was tossing and turning!!!! Ahhhhhhhh!" 🥵

This is compounding. 💰 💰 💰

Totally panicked....BUY & TRADE FOR INCOME swears to be reformed.....and immediately buys as many shares of $RYCEY as possible. Which is 924 shares at the exact moment for that original $10,000 capital investment. And just sits on it. Sure, 924 shares is an order of magnitude less than BUY & HOLD THROUGH BULL's 10,000 shares......but hey, it's still sizeable. 👍

Next, the secular trend of defensive stocks continues to heat up over the coming years. 🔥 Both BUY AND HOLD THROUGH BULL and BUY & REFORMED ( 😅) sees $RYCEY take out it's previous all-time high of just over $20.00 per share. And over the next few years it rises to $40.00, then even $100.00.

At that point, BUY & HOLD THROUGH BULL is sitting on unrealized gains of $990,000 vs. BUY & REFORMED's (artist formerly known as BUY & TRADE FOR INCOME) unrealized gains of $82,421.44. A difference of $907,578.56. 😒

But hey.....back in the day, B&TFI extracted an additional ~$28k, remember? 😂

Whoa @beskar_capital ....... what a lesson!

Amazing, isn't it?

So it's about share count. 😅 The more shares....the more compounding. After all, that's why winning options contracts are so lucrative. Think twice the next TIME you sell shares ..... because you are giving up your compounding rights when you part with them. And when you come back.....you'll never be able to get as many as before in a bull market......or likely ever again. Is it worth that for the little relative amount of income? 😅🤣😂

So when you see @beskar_capital chunking away at stocks like $USAS at 19 cents, 26 cents, 52 cents....or election indicator $NAK for 30 cents, 36 cents, 75 cents.....or $REEMF for 25 cents, 30 cents, 65 cents,.....even higher, low-priced stocks like $TTI for $3.00, $3.50, $4.00, $4.50......or $MIND for $7.00, $8.00, $9.00, or $10.00.....or $RCAT for $2.30, $5.00, $7.00, or $10.00 or $EOSEW for 20 cents, 30 cents, 50 cents or $BBAI-WT for 9 cents, 20 cents, or 50 cents.......or even $RYCEY for $4.00, $5.00, $7.00, or even $10.82.......now you know why. 😉

Low-priced stocks....accumulate shares.....over....TIME......all while 90% of your ROCK SOLID PORTFOLIO (KTS #64/#65) with increasing earnings/free cash flow outperforms the Conventionalist indexers. 🤑

You see....only ONE of those stocks needs to skyrocket.....and you are set for life.

title: Knowledge Transfer Series #65-ROCKSOLID FOUNDATION
caption:
How do you start from scratch? Hey new investors! Please take a front row seat on this one! 😁👍

Before you start on this KTS post, I insist that you read the previous one, KTS #64 THINK about Black Swan:

https://share.blossomsocial.com/yjYRhSCiptVn2xsk8

As you recall, @beskar_capital uses an UNConventional approach of applying Nassim Taleb's core idea to build a robust portfolio to future negative events. While Taleb holds a view that these events cannot be TIMED (and everyone knew it was coming after the fact 😅😂 ), his probability-based approach positions to take advantage of these inflection points - either up or down.

Beskar follows the general 90:10 ratio......of ROCK SOLID STOCKS:promising fliers. In other words, 90% of Beskar's portfolio is in his category of foundational stocks. While the rest are in stocks that can take off to the moon! So the workhorses of the portfolio will march along and outperform the S&P500........even if the 10% of the portfolio.......goes bankrupt! 😉 Get it?
This is an approach that allows you to realize absolutely incredible portfolio growth🤑......with minimal risk in the right markets.😉 YES - I SAID THAT! So you can invest in all kinds of unprofitable small caps that Conventionalists on this site will scold you for gambling😅🤣😂...........while your portfolio marches along and outperforms them!!! 🤑🤑🤑 Does that mean having 10,000 shares of a 10 cent stock can belong in a portfolio like this? Of course! 👍 Here's the math: 10,000 shares of any stock that reaches $100.......is $1 Million. 100,000 shares of a stock that reaches $10.00 in share price? Also, $1 Million. Did you know Beskar bought $VRT in the low teens just a few years ago. Recently it was $150 per share. That's 10x in 3 years. For you Canadians, did you know you could have been buying Athabasca Oil Corp $ATHOF in August 2000 when it started to Switchback and SMILE (KTS#23/#45) for just 12 cents a share? 🤩🤩🤩 10,000 shares would have cost you.....$1,200 !?!?!? Today, the stock is $4.00. That's a return of 3,233%......AND CLIMBING while it completes it's shit-eating grin (KTS #45)😅🤣😂? Had you bought 100,000 shares for $12,000, you would be sitting on $4 Million right now with further upside! Remember, ALL OF THESE PURCHASES MADE OVER THE PAST YEAR.....Beskar was buying $USAS , $NAK , $EOSEW , $SATLW , $BBAI-WT, $PDYNW , $REEMF .......... all for just pennies!!! 🤑🤑
How can I do that......without the FEAR of losing it all? Why haven't I been selling when I hit 1,000% returns on $BBAI-WT ......200%, 300%, 700% on others of these?.....all within months? 💰
Because 90% of my portfolio is a ROCK SOLID FOUNDATION. 💪
Without fear or nervousness 🥵.......I can accumulate a tremendous share count of these promising "lotto tickets" ......... but only because I have a ROCK SOLID FOUNDATION. 90% ROCK SOLID, 10% HIGH FLIER. Though a slightly different application of his theory, thank you, Taleb.......it's been good to me.

I get it, Beskar! This makes a ton of sense. So what constitutes a ROCK SOLID STOCK?
THAT is the EXACT RIGHT QUESTION. If your first question after reading the post thus far was along the lines of "What other penny stocks do you like now?".......you're missing the point. 😒 Again, the entire approach is enabled by the sheet piles that go hundreds of feet into the bedrock. 💪
So for newbies......highly recommended that you build your home on a ROCK SOLID FOUNDATION.

My recommended sources to identify ROCK SOLID STOCKS to begin your search are described below. When you do find interesting candidates, know that Beskar adds even further - and thicker layers of protection - by choosing stocks that are ripe for the point within the real estate/banking crisis cycle and that pass the KTS toolset. Make sense?😃

So new investors, I recommend that you put 90% of your portfolio in select ROCK SOLID STOCKS from these sources:

(1) MORNINGSTAR WIDE MOAT Stocks: The analogy is that a stock is a castle surrounded by a moat of water that is difficult to cross over (and steal market share). Morningstar ranks all stocks as Narrow, Wide, or None. The wider the moat, the more secure and predictable the profit stream. As a favor newbies........check out the images attached below. I am giving you a list of all of Morningstar's WIDE Moat stocks. Consider checking out @jacobb as he is disciplined and 100% focused on WIDE MOAT stocks. While I suggest 90% in these ROCK SOLID options to juice your returns with the 10% high fliers instead to get a higher overall portfolio return, Jacob does a great job bringing excellent investment candidates to the forefront for your consideration!

(2) Dividend Aristocrats 🤴 : This is a list of public companies within the S&P500 Index that have increased their dividend payments consecutively for at least 25 years. You have to be rolling in cash to be able to do that!!!! Here is this list of these 67 ROCK SOLID STOCKS: https://www.marketbeat.com/dividends/aristocrats

(3) Dividend Kings: The Dividend Kings Index is a list of 29 ROCK SOLID STOCKS that have consecutively increased their dividend payments for at least 50 years! 👑

Here is the list:
https://www.marketbeat.com/dividends/kings/

(4) ROCK SOLID STOCKS within the PACER$COWZ . This ET-STOCK-US-USDF is play on the analogy of "Cash Cows", with a strategy driven exchange traded fund that aims to provide capital appreciation over time by screening the Russell 1000 for the top 100 companies based on free cash flow yield. With a 5-star Morningstar rating, this is a highly recommended fund to dig in and find the workhorses (you'll almost never see @beskar_capital recommend an ETF.....because the ETF's BEST STOCKS are weighed down by the worst ones. Why not just use your KTS toolset and pull out the workhorses and put your money there instead? 😂 ). COWZ largest sector is Energy. It is also overweighted in sectors other than Technology. 😉👍 💸 🐄 I know many of you are likely starting to question your heavy Tech weighted portfolios......and for good reason! But check out the stocks that make up COWZ. Because when you have free cash flow after expenses and investments are made, you can raise dividends, buyback shares, or make acquistions - ALL POSITIVE actions to increase shareholder returns.

Here ya go: https://www.paceretfs.com/products/cowz#characteristics

(5) Next, I came across this one in a recent post from Michelle @fork_in_the_road_investor . Talk about ROCK SOLID Blossom contributor you should follow! (Michelle gets a Beskar Capital 5-star rating!!! 😃👍). She had a post ( https://share.blossomsocial.com/agbimzSj46hrXw7d7 ) for a TEMA ETF that invests in Monopolies & Oligopolies. It is a new fund in 2023 but it's returns thus far are incredible outperfomance. Again, would recommend digging in and finding the workhorse stocks that carry that performance rather than paying a fee to invest in the ETF.

But this ETF invests in:

*Companies with dominant and durable moats.

*Railroads, Toll Roads, Aerospace, and Financial Data

*Diversifying away from Tech Giants with Quality (And predominantly invested in "safe" economies of U.S., Netherlands, Canada, and Ireland).

Love this.......THANK YOU, MICHELLE!

(6) Last, is Toll Booth Companies. My favorites. 😍🥰🤩 They exist in all sectors. These are the ones that routinely collect fees (income) - usually off infrastructue. Think about energy pipelines $ET , grocery store memberships $COST , the subscription services of $NFLX or even toll roads themselves $VRRM ! As you start to think about reallocating some of your overexposure to Tech 😉.......this is a GREAT place to find ROCK SOLID STOCKS. Here's an article explaining these types of stocks if this is appealing to you (it should be! 😂🤣😅 ):
https://dividendearner.com/tollbooth-portfolio/

@beskar_capital always gives you real meat to chew on, eh? 😅 Why not start sleeping a little easier and build a ROCK SOLID FOUNDATION 💪 for your portfolio. Now is a great TIME because the meltup phase of the real estate/banking crisis cycle is in full swing as we get closer to the blowout top of THIS MASSIVE BULL MARKET that's been running for 15+ years now. This approach lets you RESPONSIBLY participate in some of those fun "lotto ticket" stocks to juice your returns while making sure you outperform those Conventionalists that just plow into average annual index returns of single-digit percentages.
What are some of the ROCK SOLID STOCKS that Beskar holds that are in these sources above? $ET , $FTI , $CME , $XOM , $SLB , $WPM , $AM , $RTX , $LNG , $LMT , $FANUY .....and many more. In fact, 85% of my portfolio is kickin' out Free Cash Flow at ever increasing rates 🤑🤑🤑💰 (I let it slip from 90% down as low as 75% when I'm feeling extra greedy🤑😅🤣.....but recommend that newbies stick with 90:10 ). ExxonMobil going from $30 Billion FCF to $36 Billion FCF over the next YEAR !?!?!? That's a WTF! That's the value of the country of Iceland's GDP !?!? 😅🤣😂 Even smaller companies in the Energy space are hitting 10-year highs in revenue, earnings, and FCF. Metals, miners, industrials.......these are sectors that can protect you by giving you BOTH CAPITAL APPRECIATION (share price goes up) AND INCOME (routine cash payments).😀👍

Now that's a deal!

I continue to give you my absolute best.

This is the Way! 🏄‍♂️ 🌊 🏄‍♀️ 🌊

title: Class Exercise Complete!
caption:
Great job everyone! Thank you for divvying up the work so we can glean some insight from the whales.

I have summarized your results in the images attached. First one is the entire 30 WHALES and highlighted in yellow is their collective average. So a MASTER PORTFOLIO of the most successful whales!

Now, let's dig in and find the insight😁👍:

(1) Going into 2025, Technology was clear and away the sector of choice. In fact, only 3 fund managers had ZERO exposure to the Tech Sector. Now, a few things worth noting. Electronic tech and tech derivatives trend into other sectors like industrials that are positioned for growth.....so the takeaway is that while classified "Tech", many are a play on other sectors. Tech had a rough start to the year. Nonetheless, Tech was king going into 2025 among the Whales top holdings. Notice how just after the reporting period of this (February 14th), we've had a steep selloff....especially in Tech? The Whales are likely to accumulate more in the washout! The "Meltup Phase" show must go on! Again, select Tech will perform....but they better keep beating estimates, increasing forward estimates.......and then beating those estimates. Once that cycle stops, find a chair......or your ass is going to hit the floor!😅🤣😂

(2) Second place is Consumer Discretionary?!?!?! Of course it is.......as we've been in a momentum market and $XLY keeps taking out it's previous high for over a year now!!! But what's particular interesting about this from a real estate/banking crisis cycle perspective? We know the consumer (us! 😅🤣😂 ) have been under pressure for some time now. Inflation in prices of eggs, meat, coffee, insurance, on and on......is taking a toll. Are you carrying balances on your credit card? Are you considering tapping into your deep savings funds.....even your retirement plan? Yikes. But all inline with the behavior at this stage of the meltup. You're frozen. Your expenses are crazy. You need more money. A rising stock market has been helpful.....but these 10% pullbacks.....with other daily living expenses rising.......you feel a bit on the ropes. What should we do now? GO ON A FRICKIN' LAST HURRAH EXPENSIVE VACATION! 😅🤣😂 Can you relate to any of this above? Because that's happening to most.....and the WHALES are gobblin' you up like plankton! When I looked over these Consumer and Retail Trade.....I saw A LOT of leisure.....casino, travel, and discretionary fun stuff! This summer is going to be a BLOWOUT! And remember......we know the first half will be marked with volatility and sideways movement......the 2nd half of the year will rocket into year's end to make 2025 the year of greatest returns within the 2020-2030 decade. How do you know this Beskar? Ooooh. 😉🔮

(3) Financial - But this is driven by capital markets. What's that? Anything tied to markets. Remember this is why we like $CME . Volatility just means more transactions!!!! 🤑🤑🤑 But beware, the percentage of Financial has fallen with these WHALES from the past. And we know that regional banks holding that CRE have confessional coming. We'll watch the months of May, October, and then May next year as well. 🤮 Again.....while Tech and Financial are high.......make sure you know which stocks within them you are riding with.....because earnings matter for these guys especially.

(4) Next is Energy, Healthcare, & Industrials sitting at 8%,8%, and 5%, respectively. 😉The horses (sectors) #3 through #6 are always ones to watch with WHALES. 😉These guys are good at getting in as EARLY INSIDERS (as defined by KTS #11)......and the sectors sitting in these pole positions are ready to make a move to take the lead. 😉 Not surprising as those that follow @beskar_capital know my portfolio breakdown from a few posts ago. Now let's see who has allocated a significant portion of their portfolio to these 3 sectors (defined as significantly above average)🤑🤑🤑:

Carl Ichan: 83%
Howard Marks: 61%
John Paulson: 52%
Jim Simons (RIP): 43%
George Soros: 42%
Paul Singer: 40%
Nelson Peltz: 40%
Larry Roberts: 40%

Hmmm.....these are some of the best WHALES 🐋 .....by scoreboard! Indeed, these are the whales that do that Gretzky thing......skating to where the puck is going, not where it is at the moment. 🔮 So some insight. I do have to also mention that just outside of his Top 10 holdings, David Einhorn, a TRUE MASTER 😉 of value........is absolutely stocked within these sectors and metals (materials). He's on at average 18% in these 3 sectors combined for his top 10.....but the rest of his portfolio is basically these 3 sectors and gold and silver. Just making note because 10 is an arbitrary, well accepted break point. So ADD David Einhorn......he's probably got more than the rest when you add up the balance of his portfolio! Anyway, Howard Marks is a student of cycles. His plow into energy at 61% is certainly UNconventional. 🤑🤑🤑 I bet this man's reputation remains intact! 😅🤣😂 Carl Ichan is a shrewd investor activist that knows how to TIME his entries into companies before their sector upswings. One of the best indicators. If Ichan goes in.......check out where that company is 2 years later......UP BIG! And it's not because of his "activism" in turning around the company. It's because he barnacled on to the sector whose rising tide lifts all boats. Nonetheless, his moves speak to us!!!! Paulson is tied to the banks. The banks and the government are ONE. They attempt to control the cycle with all kinds of moves in the final stages of the meltup......so they know what's going to happen better than everyone else. A real good one to tune into at this point of the real estate/banking crisis cycle. Reminds me. Michael Burry. We should have someone do that one.......he's another successful forecaster. Anyone want to run his numbers? Soros, Simons, Peltz, and Roberts are others that have a consistently successful crystal ball record. Not to slight the others.....but many of them just chase and TIME for their successes. This group (add I would add Buffett with his early entry into OXY a couple years ago with consistent accumulation) is above the others. Just look up their historical returns! Now that's insight. 😄👍

(5) Materials, Utilities, Communication Services, and Consumer Staples. I will note that Miners/precious metals within the materials sector is scattered throughout portfolios. 💰 But the allocation is low.......but rising. Utilities and Consumer Staples are recession sectors. So is a lot of Healthcare (which is up above). But keep in mind that equipment and speculative biotech are in there and those are the parts of healthcare that do well now. I think we all know about health insurance companies. 😔 Pharamceuticals can rebound a bit though! So we learn here......that the Meltup is ALIVE AND WELL!......the massive bull market MUST GO ON! 🤑🤑🤑

(6) Real Estate, Treasuries, Dow, Midcap ETF, and Emerging Markets. Real Estate putting up the goose egg for good reason. Don't take the bait! 🤮 Unfortunately, these stocks are starting to rise again....with compelling dividends. If you want a thrill, you can TIME that 4-6 month wave.....but those waves are the kind that you'll break your neck on when they come crashing down. Not for me! The DOW, Midcap, Treasuries, and Emerging Markets are early entries into the "broadening" you keep hearing about. 😉🤑 These WHALES would be in small caps too......if it even made a difference in their portfolio. Listen to Buffett's philosophy on small caps for anyone with less than $3 million. He doesn't/can't do that now because even if he buys the company outright.......it's market cap is so small........you don't even see a blip in portfolio performance. But - hey not for us! 🤑🤑🤑 That's how he got his entry into the Hall of Fame! So they do midcaps.....other unloved but big enough to move the needle - at least a bit. 😅

So there we have it. A sonic whale monitoring program......developed by our Blossom community. Hopefully you get out of this......that there's certain whales in the pod that we want trackers on......because they know what's next!

This is the Way! 🏄‍♂️ 🌊 🏄‍♀️ 🌊 🐚 🐋

title: Tetra Technologies - Go Ahead Wolves...I Dare You!
caption:
$TTI

Brady Murphy, TETRA's President and Chief Executive Officer, stated, "Our fourth quarter results were in-line with our expectations as strong offshore activity led by deepwater Gulf of America as well as continued strength in our industrial chemicals business did not quite offset weaker than normal year-end U.S. onshore activity. Adjusted EBITDA margins of 17.0% improved from 16.6% in the third quarter and from 15.8% in the fourth quarter of 2023 despite lower revenue quarter over quarter and year over year. Our strategic focus on produced water has resulted in record high treatment and recycling volumes in the fourth quarter and the commercial announcement of TETRA Oasis Total Desalination Solution (TDS), an end-to-end desalination for beneficial re-use solution has been very well received. In early January we monetized our entire equity investment in Kodiak Gas Services Inc., generating approximately $19 million in cash proceeds. We enter 2025 with a strong and growing base business, a robust backlog of deep-water projects, momentum with our produced water desalination solution, stronger demand for our TETRA PureFlow battery electrolyte, a solid balance sheet and the necessary liquidity to continue to fund our growth initiatives.

In the past week we finished the completion work for the first of three TETRA CS Neptune wells that are scheduled for the first half of the year.  When combining the TETRA CS Neptune three well project, the start of deepwater offshore projects in Brazil, our normal seasonal industrial calcium chemicals peak in the second quarter, and an expected material ramp up in Eos electrolyte orders, we expect net income before taxes in the first half of 2025 to be between $19 million and $34 million and adjusted EBITDA to be between $55 million and $65 million, which would be near or above a ten-year record high. This would compare to $13.8 million of net income before taxes and $53 million of Adjusted EBITDA from the first half of 2024. For the full year of 2025 we anticipate high single digit to low double-digit revenue growth and expect to generate over $50 million of free cash flow from our base business. The combination of these, plus advances with our produced water beneficial re-use solution, our Arkansas resource position and strategic partnerships, provides us the opportunity to continue to drive long-term shareholder value creation, aided by the tax loss carryforward.


Watching carefully at open what the dumb wolves think! 😅🤣😂

title: Class Exercise - WOW! Thanks for Stepping Up!
caption:
What participation! Made a post just before bed asking for 30 volunteers.......and got 40 by the TIME I wake up! 😁👍

Thanks to all of you willing to do this exercise! Here's the original post from last night:

https://share.blossomsocial.com/dVLrCBT1hraUvHUX9

So, let's get after it. Important TIME in the market. Why? AN EXTREMELY BULLISH SET UP IN A MASSIVE BULL MARKET MELTUP JUST TRIGGERED! (We like those 🤑🤑🤑 ). For those that have followed me since the beginning know that we are checking all boxes as we progress in the real estate/banking crisis cycle.......ON TIME!

What's going on now? The S&P500 is hitting all-time highs with a healthy amount of FEAR.......and the kicker........there's still boatloads of cash sitting on the sidelines waiting for healthy up to 10% pullbacks!

Oh my......how delicious!

But there's also undercurrents of money shifting around.......into other markets, sectors, and subsectors.

So let's make like a barnacle and check out what these whales are doing!

On Valentine's Day, all fund managers were required to file their portolio holdings on 12/31/2024. So this is a PERFECT TIME to check in on the BIGGEST WHALES and see how they are positioning for 2025! Remember.....as part of the cycle.....2025 will be the year of greatest returns. And if you are in the right sectors/subsectors.......you're going to KILL IT! 🤑
So let's get busy with our class exercise.

Overview:
(1) 30 of you that volunteered are each assigned a SUCCESSFUL WHALE.
(2) You are asked to click on the link from Holdingschannel.com , scroll down on the left side to the "Fund Managers in Focus" section and click on your assigned WHALE.
(3) Next, click on the "All Stocks Held by.........." link on the landing page of your whale click! Last, click and drag the TOP 10 HOLDINGS ONLY from the page this link takes you and copy into a spreadsheet program. (If you don't have one, get one.....or do it manually from here on out).
(4) Next, type in the stock ticker of each of the Top 10 stocks in your whale's portfolio. Please use TradingView.com to retrieve the SUBSECTOR of each stock. Again, please everyone use TradingView.com so we have a consistency in Subsector identification.
(5) Calculate the percentage of each stock as part of the TOP TEN STOCKS ONLY.
(6) Last, Summarize the SUBSECTORS by SECTORS. This is done by adding the percentages of each of the stocks in the same OVERALL SECTOR.

I know this sounds like a lot. It isn't. I did the first one, BILL ACKMAN. The actual exercise took me less than 10 minutes. I included screenshots attached here to access the data and HIGHLIGHTED IN YELLOW what exactly is being asked of YOU!

So if you can return something that looks like the screenshot with highlighted yellow, that would be great! But really......only need the final results.....highlighted in yellow. So if you just reply with a comment that has your whale and the portfolio percentage distribution by SECTOR.....it's a WIN! If you think this is too much or above your capabilities......just let me know and we'll give it to someone else. But hey,,,why not give it a try. This exercise WILL MAKE YOU A BETTER INVESTOR!

title: Accumulating MIND Technology
Knowledge Transfer Series #64 - THINK Black Swan
caption:
I owe you a couple of KTS posts. Been on college campus tours and hockey tournaments!

Another 200+ followers so posts are coming!

Today, a follow on a poll of the easiest question. Do you hold more stocks than @beskar_capital ? You'd think that would be an easy one, right? 😅🤣😂 Well, apparently it wasn't. 85% said no they don't. 15% said they did. What a flip-flop! In reality, it's more like 85% do and only 15% don't. Here's the poll results post:

https://share.blossomsocial.com/V5vgTWa6vXWNJo2X8

And amazing the comments of most of those that were adamant they hold far less. "Way too much!" "No way". "Too hard to track"., etc.😅🤣😂

I picked out some from the comments and actually got counts (until it got crazy!!!):
@seanbear holds 6,833 stocks !
@justintime holds 5,182 stocks !
@ronan07 holds more than 14,000 stocks !
@ffcatherine holds more than 10,000 stocks !
@abhayarora holds more than 3,000 stocks !
@crowsnestjess holds more than 8,000 stocks !
@kutch holds more than 12,000 stocks !
@ramsw holds 7,013 stocks !
Sure, many of these are duplicates......but it's way more than 1,000!?!??!?! 😅

......and @beskar_capital ...... just 247 stocks.
So overall, epic fail on the poll! Those that follow me closely know I advocate for an ideal roster and a minor league baseball system approach to portfolio management (Knowledge Transfer Series #26). Stock selection should be made after an analysis using your handicapping tools - whatever they are.

What shouldn't happen for those of you that spend massive amounts of TIME on an investment app.....is that you just plow it into a Conventionalist ETF. Why not? First, you must always remember that an ETF is just someone else's portfolio of 50+ stocks that you pay a hefty fee in order to participate. Again, this is someone that you've never met before! And for index type ETFs......they are certain to drag your returns down. Sure they have some great stocks......but they are also guaranteed to hold some real dogshit stocks to bring your average return down to levels that won't get you to Financial Independence before an age you can do anything else but sit.
When was the last TIME you actually looked at your portfolio, Blossomers!?!!?
Some of these ETFs.......just hold a collection of a dozen or so other ETFs! I mean......are you really trying to screw yourself or what!??!?!😅🤣

For example, $VEQT holds four other ETFs that have a combined total of 12,433 stocks !?!??! Talk about dead weight. Sure there's winners.....but all of the outperformance by those is guaranteed to be wiped out by the losers that are in there too! As we approach the peak in the real estate/banking crisis cycle within the next 4-5 quarters, these vanilla indexes are going to reach a peak as well, per script.

Did you hear of money flows moving into Europe & Germany? Commodities? Crypto? Now unloved Small & Mid Caps? Unloved sectors like Energy, Industrials, and Metals & Miners? These are not good developments for these ETFs. This is a stock picker's market and we are going to really start sorting out the winners and losers. That's not conducive to broad index outperformance. I predict indexes can continue setting new highs over the course of the next year into 2026 tax season. But the real estate/banking crisis cycle plays out on TIME and the movement is into select industries is taking place now. When I was loading up on $ET for $6.00/share in the Fall of 2020........no one but the early INSIDERS (as defined by KTS #11) were taking action. That's going on now with new stocks in the same and other similar industries. So you can continue to ride with the market indicies with your ETFs and be smug with happiness.....or you can blow it out of the water ........ and really move the needle on the FI TIME clock. It's a choice!

I share the old $IBM "THINK" motto as a suggestion for each of us to conduct an internal portfolio audit.......of what we actually own. For those unfamiliar with it, in 1911 the future IBM leader of 42 years, Thomas Watson, interrupted a sales meeting by saying "The trouble with every one of us is that we don't think enough. We don't get paid for working with our feet — we get paid for working with our heads". Watson then wrote THINK on the easel. (Wikipedia). IBM used that ever since as a way to focus reflection on how to win. Blossom........embrace the motto and look at your portfolio moves in the same way. Before you add yet another dilutive stock to your portfolio. THINK. And make sure it belongs there. Check out the portfolios above......5,000+ stocks!?!?!? Why not make sure you know why you hold EACH AND EVERY STOCK INSTEAD?

And don't confuse this with a message to avoid speculative or unprofitable stocks. That's not it either. It's just knowing how to approach your portfolio. I've seen a lot of comments about how do you do this, Beskar? So thought to share here.
Have you ever noticed how many Blossomers cite classic investment books? .....or frequently repeat trite sayings of the idolized ultrarich? But then you look at their portfolios? Do you ever think Warren Buffett or Peter Lynch would hold a portfolio that looked like that !?!?!? 😅🤣😂It's hilarious when you think about it! Next TIME you see someone reciting quotes from these money manager icons.......click on their portfolio to see what I mean!

So now I share a book that has helped shape Beskar Capital and how I THINK about managing a portfolio. The Black Swan: The Impact of the Highly Improbable is a 2007 book by Nassim Nicholas Taleb, who is a former options trader. The book defines "Black Swan" events as rare and highly unpredictable occurrences with severe consequences that appear obvious in retrospect after the fact. Past examples include COVID, 9/11, financial crisis, etc. No one is supposedly aware leading up to it.....but then afterwards, everyone knew it would happen!

Beskar uses Taleb's approach to manage my portfolio in an UNConventional way within the context of the repeatable real estate/banking crisis cycle. If explainable afterwards....how can we position in advance of such events. Taleb - a master in statistical probability helped me understand that pairing a portfolio of rock solid stocks with potential fliers at the rate of 90:10 is a formula for victory. In stocks, 1,000 shares of a $1.00 stock that rises to $60.00.......is a $59k windfall for a measly $1,000 investment. If you don't have a lot of savings, think 100 shares of a $1.00 stock going to $60.00 resulting in a $5,900 windfall. So what about 10 of these for every one rock solid stock? It's like 10 lottery tickets for every known stock. The probability for outperformance improves dramatically. And in the Black Swan event, you preserve your portfolio on the downside with 90% in a rock solid stock base. Using this approach in this part of the meltup phase of a real estate/banking crisis cycle is particularly warranted. Why? Because meltups only occur 4-5x in a typical lifetime. I allow this ratio to float a bit from 90:10 in the middle of the phase because a lot of different low-priced stocks can broadly rise. The more you hold, the better your chance for a lottery ticket. But we always tie it to a solid base. I use Free Cash Flow and Wide Moat companies for my rock solid base. This is a gem approach for risk:reward portfolio management.
So you can either choose to participate in it.....or sit out in fear. In the end looking back, as Taleb has observed in all past Black Swan events, everyone will know that it was coming. But what's about to happen over the next 2 years? You will see most all portfolios on Blossom get completely wiped out. Obliterated. It will be very sad. But know, with this KTS tool, you can still participate in this 4x in a lifetime event that can move you closer to FI than your peers......while still preparing for the unexpected.......that everyone saw.....but didn't take action.

So why not THINK instead. 😄 👍

Let's break down @beskar_capital 's portfolio and see what it really looks like in preparation:

-247 stocks
-7 stocks more than 2.5% of total portfolio
-another 17 stocks more or equal to 1% of portfolio
-75% of portfolio is in 24 stocks
-223 stocks less than 1% of portfolio

And here's the sector/subsector breakdown as we head for the Black Swan (that no one knows about......yet😂):

58.02% Energy

17.03% Mining/Precious Metals/Industrial Materials

16.2% Capital Markets/Crypto

6.34% Biotech/Health Care Innovation

1.5% Defense

0.9% Technology

Have you ever seen an UNConventional portfolio like this before?

The transition has been taking place for the past two years. The biggest wins go to the EARLY INSIDERS (as defined by KTS #11) and those of us that make like a barnacle and attach to a whale.

Why not audit your portfolio like I did above and see if it's ready to win no matter what. It certainly makes sleeping a whole lot easier.😉

Last, do you THINK timing the Black Swan events are possible? Maybe not now.....but you will later. If you don't believe me, ask Taleb! 😅

This is the Way! 🏄‍♂️ 🌊 🏄‍♀️ 🌊

title: Accumulating America's Gold & Silver
Accumulating W&T Offshore
Who's in the On Deck Circle?......🇺🇦
caption:
Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelenskyy has declined a proposal by U.S. President Donald Trump to acquire approximately 50% of Ukraine’s rare earth mineral rights. Valued at several trillion dollars, Ukraine’s mineral reserves include lithium, titanium, and graphite which are essential for high-tech industries. The proposal was delivered by U.S. Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent as part of a bid to compensate Washington for assistance to Kyiv. Trump had suggested that Ukraine owed the United States $500 billion worth of resources for its past military support. 

However, Zelenskyy is seeking better terms, including U.S. and European security guarantees. Trump’s proposal did not include provisions for future assistance, which Zelenskyy deems necessary. Zelenskyy’s team has developed an offer for a mineral partnership in exchange for security guarantees, which was announced earlier this month.

Europe’s vast natural gas inventories are currently depleting at the fastest clip since 2018 as cold weather ramps up heating needs. According to Gas Infrastructure Europe data, Europe’s gas storage was only 49% full on February 10, well below last year's 67% mark at a corresponding point and the 10-year average of 51% for the same period. The continent’s seasonal draw has been bigger than in the previous two winters due to colder weather, lower wind power generation due to low wind speeds and the termination of Russian gas imports via Ukraine. The situation is even more dire in Germany, Europe’s largest economy, with its underground sites currently only 48% full, a significant decrease from the 72% recorded at the same time last year.

title: Any Remaining Doubters TRUMP is Winning at Chess?
caption:
Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent said the US aims to squeeze Iran’s oil exports to less than 10 percent of current levels as President Donald Trump renews a campaign of “maximum pressure” on Tehran’s nuclear program.

“We are committed to bringing the Iranians to going back to the 100,000 barrels-a-day of oil exports” shipped during Trump’s first term, Bessent said in a Friday interview with Fox Business. The country is exporting 1.5 million-1.6 million barrels per day now, he said.
Oil revenues are enabling Iran to fund “terrorist activities around the world,” Bessent said.

“The Chinese, perhaps Indians, are buying the sanctioned Iranian oil, and that is unacceptable,” he told Fox Business.

Squeezing exports to 100,000 barrels per day will leave Iran in “severe economic distress,” Bessent said. The country’s internal numbers show its economy is “quite fragile right now” as a result of “massive inflation” and a “gigantic budget deficit,” he said.

title: Who thinks that world leaders just ignore Trump?😂
caption:
India to Buy More US Oil, LNG to Avoid Tariffs

by Bloomberg|Rakesh Sharma & Sudhi Ranjan Sen

Friday, February 14, 2025 8:48 AM EST

India has agreed to boost oil and gas imports from the US in an effort to reduce the trade imbalance between the two countries and avoid retaliatory tariffs.

“I think we purchased about $15 billion in US energy output,” India’s Foreign Secretary Vikram Misri said during a media briefing in Washington on Thursday, after Prime Minister Narendra Modi met President Donald Trump. “There is a good chance that this figure will go up as much as $25 billion.”

Misri added that it was “entirely possible increased energy purchases will contribute to impacting the deficit between India and US.”

Like him or not.......Trump's tariff talk actions are clearly effective in helping the USA's GDP.

title: The End of Coal is Nowhere in Sight
caption:
https://oilprice.com/Energy/Coal/The-End-of-Coal-Is-Nowhere-In-Sight.html

Despite continued retirements of coal-fired power in the U.S., lower coal demand in Europe, and the end of the 142-year coal electricity in the UK, global coal demand hit another record high last year. And consumption is set to remain at these high levels—or even hit new all-time highs—for a few more years.

Emerging Asian economies, led by China and India, have been sustaining global coal demand growth this decade. They plan additional coal-fired capacity to support their respective renewables booms with 24/7 baseload power and avoid power crunches or blackouts like the ones they suffered in the early 2020s.

Global Coal Demand At Record High

Global operating coal power capacity has increased by 13% since 2015, data from Global Energy Monitor (GEM) shows.

😅🤣😂

So next TIME you want big oil and gas companies to stop or slow drilling activity, think twice. The best thing for the environment with consideration of improving the worldwide standard of living is for 🇺🇸 and 🇨🇦 to extract as much as possible! Why? Because emissions from our molecules are relatively harmless.....and we now have the technology to capture it at the source.

Think about that.

So while Europe fires up the coal plants....while China continues to construct a new coal power plant at the rate of 1 per month........... and now while India's growth from low to middle class explodes.....they are all looking for cheap and reliable energy.

What a colossal failure to let our politicians lead us like a child demanding instant gratification taking us on a path of "lightswitch" transition.

Now we need to embrace and empower the big oil and gas companies and their efforts.

So what can you do to help the cause?

Invest in them!
