title: Accumulating Energy Vault
Knowledge Transfer Series #53 - UOA
caption:
Unidentified Object Activity?

Like the "drones" that have been flying over naval bases and Trump's golf course along the east coast? (Latest conspiracy - or fact? - is that Archer Aviation $ACHR and Joby Aviation $JOBY are testing their vertical takeoff/landing personal EV air transportation systems for urban air mobility. Think Jetsons! 😅🤣😂 Keep an eye on those stocks though....wouldnt be the first TIME the rich wanted to keep all of the early profits to themselves! 😅😂😉

But no.....that's not today's tool. Instead, an even greater insight for you to use regularly:

UOA - Unusual Options Activity

It is an effective method of following the early insider money (a Beskar Capital hallmark (maybe reread KTS #11, #19, #20, and #25 to get in the holiday spirit!😅).....and making loads off it. Pioneered by linebacker brothers that did a stint in the NFL, Jon & Pete Najarian are @beskar_capital respected sources of knowledge Transfer. 😄👍

So if you need a holiday hardcover to relax and further understand your options knowledge, this is a recommended go to. Again, Beskar Capital has just a few pockets of respect amongst all of the ravenous, greedy Wall Street wolves. There are some that are genuine, open-minded, and well-intentioned to help INVESTORS (as defined by KTS #11) to WIN. The Najarians are in this small group of trust.

They have loads of books, How to Trade Options, Follow the Money, It's Not an Option Not to Trade Options, etc.....they all basically cover the UOA strategy. But they do provide all kinds of context to the Wall Street environment and shrewd wolf behavior. So worth the read. Personally, I would recommend the 2018 version of the same in Follow the Money. Not surprised one bit that there's a new book out here as the 2nd stage of the meltup phase of the real estate/banking crisis has kicked off! 😅🤣😂 And if you've all in ...... they have a pricey Rebel's Edge subscription service if you want to go all in on them.

But I'll share an overview of the strategy here. So let's go!

UOA is when someone opens a trade in options contracts that is GREATER THAN THE CURRENT OPEN INTEREST in a particular contract, strike & expiration. So two key columns we keep an eye on for UOA seeking......Volume (today's contracts written) and Open Interest (cumulative and current open contracts). Usually labeled "Vol" and "OI". Easy enough?

So the insight is that - for a particular contract with a said strike and expiration - when today's volume of contracts (1st column) grossly exceeds the active open interest of current contracts written (2nd column).......somebody knows something!.....and in wolf like spirit.....they can't help their instincts to put that knowledge to profit. Greedy frickin' bastards! 😅🤣😂 The key is that we have to know they are OPENING (so that means BUYING calls or puts) contracts. And since Open Interest is always updated the following day.....we know that if the Volume is >>>> than the Open Interest.......they MUST be opening contracts (You can't CLOSE contracts that haven't been opened....😅🤣😂). Get it?

Disclaimer: This is NOT INSIDER trading. Insider trading is illegal of course....and it could be quite likely that the UOA buyer is acting on private information. The Najarian work around is that we are watching the options market and acting on publicly available information to all. 😉🤑🤑

Ok, Beskar.....I appreciate this. And I follow what you're saying. But can you give me an example to better understand it?

You bet! Yesterday, a UOA flashed in the Oil & Gas space......a focus of our winter capstone project on CALL LEAPs. See our collaborative post on CALL LEAP rankings compiled by @nealwatson, @revival.shop, @goldenfit, and @beskar_capital .

While not on our list of 72.......this is EXACTLY the kind of UOA that we want to see to plow in on the JUICIEST RETURNS (think on par with warrants for those that follow me 😉😅).

$EPD - Enterprise Partners Products, L.P.

Midstream energy services to producers and consumers of natural gas, natural gas liquids,(NGLs), crude oil, petrochemicals, and refined products.

What happened? First, with the stock, notice yesterday - just before the close - the volume traded was relatively massive....and the stock climbed into the close. Wolves are trying to hide their accumulation folks! 🤑🤑🤑

Next, check out the 2 screenshots below of the CALL LEAP option chains. The June 18, 2026 screenshot shows the typical volumes and open interest for Calls in the $15.00 to $45.00 strikes, right? In all cases.....today's volume is much less than the current open contracts listed in the "OI" (or Open Interest" column. This is typical.......99% of the TIME when you check on options chains.

But now look at the January 15, 2027 CALL LEAPs. Focus on the red ovals. WTF!?!??! Both the $32.00 strike and the $27.00 strike had contracts opened yesterday that FAR EXCEEDED the number of open contracts at those strikes, respectively. See that? So for the $32.00 strike, someone opened 8,102 contracts while the OI was only 1,845 at that strike. Remember, the OI is updated the following day......so you can find the OI is much higher today when you check the chain.

Now realize for those $32.00 strikes, those 8,102 contracts cost $1,652,808......and that's not including the $CME fees! 😅🤣😂

The same person is possibly responsible for the 8,120 contracts at the $27.00 strike as well. Those are ANOTHER $3,857,000 (plus fees) bet on EPD!!!! That's a total bet of over $5.5 million on EPD getting to at least $34.00 by January 15, 2027. Pretty sure this isn't a coin toss bet! 😅🤣😂 Know your role. You are a mere INVESTOR (as defined by KTS #11). 😂

Whoa......shit. Somebody knows something. TIME to make like a barnacle and attach to this whale! 😅🤣😂 🐚 🐋

Now, the Najarians recommend that when you pan for nuggets of UOA gold like this......SELECT THE NEXT LOWER STRIKE contract to lower your risk and still profit mightily. 🤑🤑🤑🤑

So that means going for the $30 or the $25.00 strikes (yellow ovals) , respectively. Obviously, the higher strikes are cheaper and allow for the accumulation of more contracts, further compounding the holy grail JUICE we seek.

I always give you the meatiest cuts, Blossomers, don't I? 😅🤣😂 Think about sinking your incisors into a 2" thick filet mignon and the red myoglobin juice gushes like oil! 😅🤣😂

Oh shoot......I have so much fun with this, don't I? 😊

I post a new Knowledge Transfer Series every 100 new followers. If you like them and haven't read everyone of them withextreme care, I recommend starting with the self-proclaimed greatest post in Blossom history from early March 2024, "They are telling us so what are you waiting for " and then move into the Knowledge Transfer Series #1 thru #53 today....and counting. 😁👍 Brush up on a layman options overview in KTS #30 thru #36A. 😉

The mission is to handily outperform the S&P500 realizing absolutely amazing double-digit annualized returns throughout the real estate/banking crisis cycle completion.....and properly position into the next one and beyond! 🤑🤑🤑

ALL of this knowledge and tools are needed as we position for the energy revolution that will lead to outsized returns Conventionalistscouldn'teven dream of! 😅🤣😂 Even though their Messiah (Warren Buffett) used CALL LEAPs to make MASSIVE PROFITS in $KO. title: NEW Position in SBM Offshore
caption:
$SBFFY-STOCK-US-USD-STOCK-US-USD
$SBFFF-STOCK-US-USD-STOCK-US-USD

Exxon will soon start generating natural gas at its Guyana assets. Netherlands-based SBM Offshore (OTCPK:SBFFF) (OTCPK:SBFFY) has completed the $1.23B sale of its fifth floating production, storage, and offloading (FPSO) unit to Exxon for use in offshore Guyana. With a production capacity of 250,000 barrels of oil per day, the FPSO Jaguar has a daily associated gas treatment capacity of 540 million cubic feet and a water injection capacity of 300,000 barrels per day. ExxonMobil is progressing with plans to build a Gas to Energy Project in cooperation with the Government of Guyana, with start-up expected by the end of 2024.

title: Read it and Weep. 🥲🤑
caption:
https://oilprice.com/Energy/Energy-General/AIs-Energy-Appetite-Sparks-Global-Power-Grid-Concerns.html

The global data center market is expected to be valued at around USD $300 billion in 2024, with a projected average compound annual growth rate of about 10% over the next five years, driven almost entirely by the growth of artificial intelligence, according to analysis by TMT Finance. 

Balancing AI-driven data center demand with competing energy, water needs is a critical piece of responsible investment and governance, as runaway data center construction could lead to energy shortages, skyrocketing energy prices, and sharply increased greenhouse gas production. Already, the annual power consumption of AI is more than most entire countries – only 16 nations consume more energy in a year than AI. “The almost overnight surge in electricity demand from data centers is now outstripping the available power supply in many parts of the world,” Bloomberg reported back in June. 

Some countries, such as Ireland, Saudi Arabia and Malaysia are already facing serious problems with producing enough energy to power their already-planned data centers. In the United States, a recent scientific study found that unless the government invests billions of dollars in generation and transmission capacity over the next few years to meet demand surges from data centers, Americans can expect their energy costs to go up by as much as 70 percent.

title: Knowledge Transfer Series #51 - Everywhere Signs
caption:
🎶 🎵 Sign, sign
Everywhere a sign
Blockin' out the scenery
Breakin' my mind
Do this, don't do that
Can't you read the sign? 🎵 🎶

Are we enjoying this raging bull market in the 2nd stage of the meltup phase of the real estate/banking crisis cycle? 🤑🤑🤑

Those that have read the entire Knowledge Transfer Series posts know already, but Beskar Capital makes moves with EARLY INSIDERS (as defined by KTS #11) with respect to the point in TIME of the real estate/banking crisis cycle to realize absolutely amazing double-digit annualized returns by consistently outperforming the S&P500. If new and interested, start with my first post "They are telling us so what are you waiting for " and then move into the Knowledge Transfer Series #1 thru #51 (here today 😅) and beyond......

So today's tool is developing your sense of observation to enhance your ability to take profitable action by TIMING markets. News, stories, advertisements, blogs, podcasts, etc. are coming at you like a blizzard. But most all of it is just noise and a waste of your TIME. But if you start developing your sense of what your surroundings are saying to you, I promise you will be able to make huge gains!

Today, it's signs. Look all around you. Credible stock tips are being presented to you amongst the noise. But with an understanding of the cycle and society's repeatable behaviors within the cycle, you can filter out some amazing stock tips! 🤑🤑🤑

First exercise: For the next 10 days....every day at a random TIME while the market is open.......tune in to CNBC....and write down the first 5 tickers you see that scroll across the bottom of the screen. Put it in a spreadsheet. Come back the next day at a different TIME. Why? Because it will tell you so much about the EARLY INSIDERS repositioning as we head into the new year. Amazing insight. Hint: Don't be surprised if it isn't riddled with Mag 7 stocks. Mag is the new "Mid"! 🤣😂

Second exercise: Start paying attention to signs, billboards, and ads. Next TIME you watch a hockey game, those ads in the ice? on the boards? Start looking into it. I remember watching hockey back in 2021 and seeing "Energy Transfer" logos in the ice in an Eastern division game.....thinking WTF....whose going to buy something from $ET-STOCK-US-USD ..... B2B advertising at a hockey game!?!?! 😂🤣😅 Don't you wish you bought shares then!?!!?!

Then, a year later, that same icon pops up on the Dallas Stars helmets(think they are still there today). 😅🤣😂

Now just two weeks ago....on the highway in the Midwest I see a Cenovus Energy $CVE-STOCK-US-USD / $CVE-STOCK-CA-CAD billboard!?!?! Another WTF moment....who is possibly going to be influenced to buy anything on their commute home....for another B2B advertisement!?!?! They sell bitumen! Tucked in between a McDonald's billboard and a jewelry billboard. So odd.

Third exercise: Stop what you're doing when CNBC has their CEO Interviews segment AND they are talking to a CEO who is not part of the "regulars". So if it's Mark Bennioff from $CRM-STOCK-US-USD...forget it. They use him as a filler. But if it's Randy Smallwood from out of nowhere Wheaton Precious Metals $WPM-STOCK-US-USD/$WPM-STOCK-CA-CAD, sit up!!!! 😉😉🤑🤑👍👍 These are very bankable investment ideas.

I remember when Trane Technologies CEO came on out of nowhere in June 2022 .... and the stock hasn't quit since! 😅 Remember, it's for companies that you aren't familiar with that get an invite out of the blue. Watch for it....then track their stock performance for a year following! It is AMAZING! Note: Sometimes Jim Cramer gets them on his evening show because they are in town. Those are fine. But don't take Cramer show EXCLUSIVE interviews in the same light. He has way too many CEO friends that he tries to help their languishing stock price by giving props.

A fourth exercise, if you tune in to CNBC, Bloomberg, etc. watching the commercials is more important than the show!!! How UNconventionalist! 😅🤣😂 So check out the ETFs they're pimpin'. Lately, new ones I've seen ar $PAVE, Mid Cap ETF, and $XLE. And how about a Chvron commercial making sure I know they have an innovative project upcoming in the Gulf of Mexico!

Guess what 2025 is going to look like folks? Mid caps, Infrastructure, Energy, and Drilling in the Gulf of Mexico! They are telling you what to invest in now!😂🤣😅 But it makes sense.......as they are marketing products that are desirable to the public against their competitors. So start paying attention! 😅🤣😂 And not too geeky to write them down somewhere and track it to see what I mean how performance follows. 😂🤑👍

In closing, I'm not saying start paying attention to all advertisements, signs, and logos you see and run out and pick up shares. Instead, I'm suggesting to start paying attention to companies you're not used to seeing.....and maybe dig in on their fundamentals. There's a reason why they are popping up in this part of the real estate/banking crisis cycle. 😉🤑👍

Recent ones I've seen are Wheaton Precious Metals, Cenovus Energy, and Bread Financial. I already started CALL LEAP buying on Wheaton. 😉

Learning how to TIME markets requires a sense of filtering your environment and psychology. It comes with experience, back testing, and constantly understanding where you are within the real estate/banking crisis cycle. I've already done this work for you. Test it for yourself....but this is a sense you want to develop. The market is constantly talking to us.....you just have to learn how to listen and take profitable action! 🤑👍

So try these 4 exercises above.....and see if you can't find an investment that looks like $TT below after their out of the blue CEO interview!

This is the Way! 🤑🤑🤑🏄‍♂️🌊🏄‍♀️🌊

CONCLUSIONS and TAKEAWAYS from SAMPLE CHART BELOW:

(1) The 9-month chart is a sweet spot for this tool. Why? We've learned that markets discount the future earnings roughly anywhere from 6 to 12 months of actual earnings. So the ~9 month chart is a good TIME period to use. But other chart periods in the 3 to 18 month are ideal to check as well. In the example below, I used the YTD (11-month chart).

(2) The mountain chart is the sample stock $NRGV

(3) There are 2 lines in the chart below the mountain. The BLUE line is the Relative Strength of Energy Vault vs. the S&P500 index. ALL platforms can show this so find it on yours. If not, TIME to get a new platform. The YELLOW line is the 40-day SMA (simple moving average) of the blue line (Rel. Strength of stock vs. S&P500).

(4) Both TRADERS and INVESTORS can use this tool. I am an active INVESTOR (as defined by KTS #11). Traders focus on the Buy& Sell signals (red circles = sell, purple circles = buy). Active Investors focus on the GREEN circles to enter a stock investment and subsequent GREEN circles to accumulate stock. Trader signals on bottom portion of chart. Active Investor signals on the top portion of the chart (see YELLOW and BLUE OVALS).

(5) Look at the BLUE line only (Rel Str vs. S&P500). Visually, find major inflection points that break a trend - either up or down. These are signals to enter or exit.

(6) The biggest gains come when the CHANGE IN SLOPE OF THE BLUE line following an inflection point is STEEPEST. Read that again. It's slope that's more important than absolute value. For you Calculus guys, slope is indeed the first derivative of the function. 🤔🤫😄🫡

(7) Notice when the blue line starts gapping meaningfully from ....or closing gaps toward.....the yellow line, it's TIME to take action! 🤑 👍.

(8) Notice that when the blue line crosses SIGNIFICANTLY over the yellow line, it's TIME to take action. Above, BUY. Below, SELL. Notice how - for an INVESTOR - we see the blue line "bumping it's head" below or barely above all during the yellow "LONG TERM SELL" line? Then, the significant crossover ABOVE signals for the LONG-TERM INVESTOR to enter....also coinciding with just another Trader buy signal. Whole lot easier to make 3 trades as an INVESTOR over this TIME period vs. a trader who makes 15. You can have that capital working elsewhere while you wait for the LT signal! (opportunity cost).😅

(9) Notice the slope of the yellow line at all TIMES. It is always either up, down, or flat. Any signfificant upward crossovers of blue line over yellow line .......in flat, or perferably uptrending yellow line, are major BUY signals. Reread this one again with a second cup of coffee! 😂

(10) our preference for MASSIVE TIMING gains comes from the longer downward trending yellow line with the blue line bumping it's head "on the yellow line ceiling" all the way down......but then breaks significantly above in a crossover. Think KTS #23. 😉🤑 The longer the better. Why? Because we invest in TIME, not price. 😅🤣🤣😂

title: Knowledge Transfer Series #49 - Reversal Indicator
caption:
Supply and Demand.

The basics of economics. Supply chain, price floors & ceilings, commodities, housing incentives, tariffs, concert tickets, generators, plumber/electrician services, on and on. All centered on the amount of supply.....and the corresponding amount of demand.

It's the first chart you make in an Econ 101 course. It's also how policy (philosophy) is formed.

If the demand for something is high (think energy for AI), but the supply is low, we can expect a rise in prices until we find the balance (equilibrium) between the two. Conversely, if the demand is low (think COVID masks today), they cant give them away!!! 😂 So it's really important to understand where you are on the supply-demand curve for ANYTHING you buy. Get it?

Securities are no different. That's right.....think STOCKS for example.

There is a constant supply-demand relationship with the stock of any company. Such that, at any given TIME, each and every stock is in one of 3 states with respect to the supply-demand curve for that stock:

(1) Accumulation period: Simply put....there are more investors willing to buy shares than there are investors willing to sell them. The result: The stock price rises until it enters one of the other two phases.

(2) Consolidation (Balanced) period: Here, the number of investors wanting to buy the stock offsets the number of investors willing to sell the stock. The result: While it can fluctuate in a range, the stock price goes nowhere until it enters one of the other two phases.

(3) Distribution period: You got it.....here there are more sellers of the stock than willing buyers. The result: The stock price declines until it enters one of the other two phases.

So even for stock prices......it's just supply and demand. See the 2-year chart below for $PYPL. I marked the three phases (1- Accumulation, 2-Consolidation (Balanced), 3-Distribution).

Ok, ok. This is really easy to understand, Beskar. But how do I use this information in investing!?!?!

Great question! Look at the sample 2-year chart again.....and circle the date in TIME that you wish you bought the stock.....and with a different color, circle the date you wish you sold it. Now what if I told you there is a tool out there that can help us identify these "reversal" points in TIME to either enter......or exit.....a stock because it is about to enter one of the other two phases? That would be nice, eh? Well there is! 😁🤑 👍

The Accumulation-Distribution Index.

Plotted as a line and available in your trading platform, it is a cumulative measure of the supply and demand in the stock. So it is typically a reliable indicator to confirming how strong a phase trend is ..... or if the current trend is getting "tired" and ready to enter a new phase. Generally, the A/D line gives us a heads up notice on the future stock price direction....and they move together. But when the stock's price continues to rise.....but the A/D line is flat or declining, the divergence in stock price and A/D line can indicate that a phase change is coming soon. Conversely, a rising A/D line amidst a decling stock price trend let's us know of a point of reversal in price. The supply-demand of any given stock will ultimately play out in it's little sibling's line chart, price. 😅🤣😂 These reversal poi ts may take a little TIME to play out. But building demand for a stock while the current price continues dropping.....can give you a great TIMING signal used in conjunction with KTS #23.😂 Ever wonder how @beskar_capital finds these tickers and TIMES them? 😅

Read the previous paragraph again.....5 times. Then imagine how this information can be used with longer-term LEAP options for the juiciest returns.

For this one, I want you to start pulling up each of your holdings and check out the trend of the A/D line relative to the stock's price trend. Find past phase changes....and see how the A/D line behaved leading into it.

We love TIME and Volume here. Price is a little brother we put up with because we have to.....because it's a focus for everyone else (Conventionalists). This statement will become clearer and clearer as we continue rolling out the full KTS toolkit! 😂

But for now, let's dissect our securities and learn how little brother price charts follow big brother's A/D line movements. Step back and look at the BIG picture .... and longer-dated charts. 😉

Are we having fun yet? You should be. 😅🤣😂

This is the Way! 🏄‍♂️ 🌊 🏄‍♀️ 😉🤑

title: Knowledge Transfer Series #48 - The Coiled Spring
caption:
Just bookmark this now. 😂🤣😅 (This is one you want to keep in your holster).

Good Morning, Blossom! And special thanks to the 1,700 non-Conventionalist followers that understand that achieving financial independence before you are too old to enjoy it is a worthy goal! 😂 Find a comfy seat and make sure the coffee is hot. Let's GO!

The Coiled Spring: A coil spring is a device that is used to store energy and subsequently release it and has the ability to absorb shock.

Can you see that rattlesnake in the desert that you just walked up on? Coiled for an immediate surge at any moment....but it's completely safe and secure from any attack from you. The chance of an upcoming potential massive energy release at any second is EXTREMELY HIGH.......while at the same TIME.......the risk of the coil formation to be attacked is EXTREMELY LOW.

Whoa.....what if we can find stocks that are "Coiled Springs"? You know.....high probability of doubling within a year or two......without any detectable downside risk? Some of these venomous stocks are coiled for 2x, 3x, 4x, and more......in relatively no TIME at all! Sounds awesome @beskar_capital , sign me up!!!😂

OK....but first an engineering lesson. 😅 As we go snake huntin' we prefer to locate the best opportunities in longer-dated charts. Preferably 1+ year or more. But LOVE finding 2-, 3-, 5-, 10-, and even 20+-year charts. Why? Because the longer the coil, the more potential energy will be released. See, if we "prestress" the coil.....with more and more tension as TIME passes, then when the energy converts from potential (resting coil state) to kinetic (kinetic energy release), then the more explosive the move!

Ok, ok, Beskar. You're geeking me out. I think I get what your saying though. The longer a stock remains coiled.....when it does "spring into action"....the further the stock price rises over TIME. So can you give me some examples?

Of course! How about a PAST, a PRESENT, and a FUTURE example?

But first, we need to recognize what the real lesson here is......that we are trading/investing in TIME, not price. Whoa....that's some heavy shit. 🤔🤫🤨😵‍💫 We will bring the accolades someday to the greatest economists and traders/investors in history for this phenomenon (KTS#100). 😂😍😅 🏄‍♂️ 🌊 🏄‍♀️ 🤑🤑🤑

Prestressing lesson: The coil builds tension in stocks whose FUNDAMENTALS (earnings) continue to deliver but their stock falls or goes nowhere. This can last for months, quarters, or YEARS! We prefer YEARS! 😂🤑🤑

But for now, let's get to work on these examples (SEE CHARTS BELOW). 😃👍

PAST: $COST
PRESENT: $CME , $LNG
FUTURE: $JHX

For Costco, @beskar_capital saw the spring developing in late 2022 .... but with the guidance of TIME and a consideration of where we were in the real estate/banking crisis cycle, I waited to buy the stock at $502 per share in May 2023 as the coiled spring released. If still holding today, I would be realizing the 2x any day now. In February 2024, I booked the gains and redeployed into miners & metals, energy, and other commodities that have an even greater coil.

The two recent examples, $CME and $LNG just released their coil. 😁🤑 How long will it last? Look at the circles on the chart to see the "head" bumping on the "ceiling" (line). Now they broke through....and it will run a long TIME. How the hell do you know that, Beskar !?!?! Because all the while the stock went nowhere (below the ceiling), CME was breaking all-time records on contracts and LNG was booking record LNG exports.

Last, $JHX. The company is building earnings. Stock price is rangebound....for now. Coiling. Every reporting period is just more prestressing. You know, that HGTV marketing ploy of expensive (but nice 😁) building materials? That's them. Let the talking heads glaze over Home Depot and Lowe's. We can wait until the JHX rattlesnake strikes instead. Remember the home equity loans I begged you not to open right now? (Reduce debt, don't expand it at this TIME). Buy this stock instead.....but wait to strike when the TIME tells you so.

So you see......while the Conventionalists are obsessed with PRICE......we focus on TIME......so we can kick the crap out of those indexes.

Learn to read and listen to what markets are telling you. You are a mere INVESTOR (as defined by KTS #11). You are not a market maker and there's barely a chance that you'll ever become an INSIDER (as defined by KTS #11). So throw your "hope" investment strategy out the door, make like a barnacle and attach to a whale to enjoy the ride!

title: Knowledge Transfer Series #47- Climbing to the Top
caption:
We've added another 100 followers 😄👍 so we add another Knowledge Transfer Series post to help everyone continue building an advanced toolkit to consistently outperform the S&P500 with absolutely amazing double-digit annualized returns - year after year!  

For those new to the Series, I recommend that you start with my first post, "They are telling us so what are you waiting for" and then move into the Knowledge Transfer Series,  which is up to #47 today and going to 100 and beyond!

Warning:  ⚠️⚠️⚠️. If you are a member of the Conventionalist Army that insists on socking your life savings into an S&P500 product for 7% average annualized returns so you can achieve financialindependence the same day you start shuffling your feet in the grocery store.....then the UNconventional tools presented in this series are NOT for you.  We use TIMING, we read the real estate/banking crisis cycle, and we DON'T routinely DCA or DRIP.  This is your kryptonite! 😅🤣😂

What we do ....do....is aim to trounce the S&P500.  The next few KTS posts are going to cover some specific tools to do just that.  Why? Because this is the TIME for these momentum tools.  Knowing what type of market you're in and which tools to use is the most important step in consistently beating the index.  But first, let's reacquaint ourselves with the objective.  Here's why: 

https://share.blossomsocial.ca/YewsU8NTaU1pAKHJA

So those that follow me know, we expect 2025 will be the calendar year of greatest returns in the 2020-2030 decade. And , if you've been following, you know we've been scaling in to small and mid caps for the past 7 months......ahead of the election and market wide recognition of this transition.  Love our unrealized gains in these names ahead of the rest.......but this wake up is just beginning! 😅

So let's get to a tool that captures the shift in favor for the last 7 months.....and captures the favor since the election....and should be your first KTS tool consulted at this point in the 2nd stage of the meltup phase of the real estate/banking crisis cycle.

Ok, ok, what is it already?!?!?!   Survey says?

The 200-day Double Exponential Moving Average (DEMA). (FYI - the 200-day DEMA is more sensitive to recent trading days, which we want to be sure to use around market moving events like the election. It will converge with the simple moving average over TIME.....but just always use the 200-day DEMA to make things less complicated).

At this point, before you buy any stock or ETF, maybe ONLY CONSIDER securities that are currently trading above their long-term moving average (200-day).  Conversely, any security NOT trading above it......is probably a good candidate to SELL.  Did you hear that Easy Button Conventionalists? 😅🤣😂  In this current market, you can simply use this one universal tool for the foreseeable future.  And for you ultraconservative, risk averse, worried about the market people......this is a very easy way to manage your portfolio and beat the S&P500.  How?  The market is broadening and future money flows will be chasing winners.  The index is what it is and will continue reflecting the performance of all of its holdings - some trading above, some trading below their respective 200-day moving averages.  So let's just easy button win! 😅

Is this true?  Yes....yes it is.....and you need to prove it to yourself. 

One rule though.  CLOSING PRICES ONLY.  Stocks and ETFs can flirt with crossovers of the 200-day MA intraday.......ignore those.  Again, only look at daily closing prices to determine the crossovers.

So let's do a quick audit of your portfolio.  Recommend that you check each security and see if it's trading above it's 200-day MA. 

What percent of your core holdings are above their respective 200 day MA?  Maybe share that below?

If it's a high percentage,  than you are likely beating the index.  If it's a low percentage,  you would likely be better off IN the index.

Again, this is a particular market where this is going to work.  One where massive amounts of sideline money market funds are coming in to chase winners.  

So it's easy to beat S&P500 these days by simply holding only stocks trading above their 200-day Moving Average. Buy those above.  Sell those below.

If you don't want to test this with your portfolio,  why not create a watchlist to see it work?

Sure there will be healthy market pullbacks along the way, but the next 6 months, using this above 200-day MA is the right tool for the right job (outperform the S&P500)!

 More UNconventional outperformance tools coming.😉  But for now, enjoy the mountain climb.

 “Everyone wants to live on top of the mountain, but all the happiness and growth occurs while you’re climbing it.”

- Andy Rooney

 
This is the Way! 🏄‍♂️ 🌊 🏄‍♀️

caption:

caption:
We've added another 100 followers since the last KTS post #45 - SMILE if You Want to Get Rich! So , as promised, I am adding the next KTS Tool here today - How TIMELY! 😅🤣😂

First, for those that haven't been following, the Knowledge Transfer Series is a toolkit that will help you learn to read, listen to, and TIME the markets to successfully outperform the S&P500 and realize absolutely amazing double-digit annualized returns over the next 4-6 quarters through the peak of the real estate/banking crisis cycle.....and beyond! 😉 If you haven't done so already, this is a GREAT TIME to start with my first post - and then move into reading the entire Knowledge Transfer Series. At #46 now, it's going to #100 and beyond - just in TIME to prepare you to profit ahead during the meltup phase - and also throughout the elevator drop in markets that will follow. If you want to add this inexpensive toolset to your financial approach, start with my post from early March this year, "They are telling us so what are you waiting for?":

https://share.blossomsocial.ca/wKLSwpZjCQMPJPnK6

I have shamelessly proclaimed (😅) that post as the most profitable insight and greatest post in Blossom history. It will - someday - be the most bookmarked post.

Ok, ok, enough of the self promotion already......let's get on with the KTS tool, Beskar!

😳

Pyramids. Over 2,000 years old. One of the 7 Wonders of the World. Ancient history. And a beautiful risk-aversion tool for wealth accumulation.

First, let's recognize the approach of The Conventionalist Army. These are the ones that want you to just chunk your life savings away in a S&P500 security of some sort to index your way to eventual wealth so you are finally financially independent on the same day you can no longer hike, you start taking daily pills out of a box like an advent calendar, or the day you go to bed by 8 pm.
Ugh! 🤮 Conventionalists also love to DRIP (reread KTS #4) and DCA (reread KTS #10/#10A) into securities..lazy and unintelligent investing.

As most often the case, we choose to do the direct opposite of Conventionalists. Remember, most INVESTORS (as defined by KTS #11) are not rich. Also, most INVESTORS are members of the Conventionalist Army and their teachings. Therefore, we will follow the few Anti-Conventionalists - and their behaviors - to be a member of the class of few wealthy INVESTORS that ride with the EARLY INSIDERS - that are extremely wealthy! Remember the early colonials that hid in the woods with their muskets and tattered clothes waiting to See the Whites of Their Eyes of the marching Brits in formation! 😅🤣😂

The Conventionalist weapon of choice? Dollar cost averaging, or DCA. This is where they continually build a position in a downward trending pattern of their favorite security. They buy a bunch to begin with. Then they continually bleed more money, of lesser and lesser amounts, into the security over TIME knowing someday it will reverse course again. All for 7% annualized return. Someday building a reserve for free soup at Bob Evan's every day at 4 pm, a few hours before bedtime! 😅 All the while, it could be growing in something in a rising trend!😂 (KTS #10/10A, #23).

A simple break down of the shape of this investment money - an inverted (upside down) pyramid. You know, like Japan's population distribution? How did that work out for their economy the past 25 years of having lots of old people and few young ones.

DCA is an inverted pyramid. DCA is Conventionalist. Do the opposite of Conventionalists (most of the TIME).

So that means .....Pyramid your capital investment 💰 !

Here's how:
When a fundamentally sound security first breaks its pattern to the upside (KTS#29) su]orted by money flows from EARLY INSIDERS (as defined by KTS #11), that is the moment to build the base of the pyramid by placing the most capital investment. Next, after the higher high and the higher low is set in place, that's the TIME to build the subsequent layer of the pyramid by ACCUMULATING more shares but not as much capital as your initial investment. For the subsequent higher high/higher low pairs, keep building more layers of your capital investment pyramid, each layer 20% less than the previous layer investment amount until the layers are built .

Then ride and watch the fruits of your labor (or labour for you 🇨🇦) 😅. This wealth creation tool was recognized and repeated by the greatest trader/investor of all-time (KTS #100).

MOST Blossomers invest at one point in TIME...and then are content to watch it grow. Or they feel like it already moved as if "I missed it!"..when in fact it is just beginning a lloonngg upward move. While it's true that with every higher highlow pairing, the probability of the security to continue rising is in constant decline, in many to most cases with respect to the 2nd stage of the meltup phase of the real estate/banking crisis cycle-it is a slow movement.

🎶 🎵 We'll be dancing 🕺 💃 in the Streets 🎶 🎵

🎶 🎵 Celebrate good times, C'mon, let's Celebrate! 🎶 🎵

But BUYER BEWARE! 😈 🤘 💀 ☠️

These rate cuts are NOT to help you. Instead, they are to have you shoulder some bad decisions made by the banks.

YOU MUST LEARN THAT THE FEDERAL RESERVE AND THEIR RATE CUT CYCLE IS DESIGNED TO PROTECT & SAVE THE BANKS! Learn this now - or be a victim later.

Let's Review the current state of economy:

(1) GDP and earnings estimates are rising.
(2) Unemployment is relatively very low.
(3) Consumer spending continues to be solid.
(4) We haven't yet reached the Fed's inflation target of 2%.
(5) Housing prices continue to climb to record highs.

So why do you think we need this massive liquidity injection? And not 25 basis points like Fed speak led us to believe they are listening to the data and easing into a cut cycle..but 50 basis points !??!?!

WTF ! This IS NOT good.

This tells you something is seriously wrong with the banks. And if you've been following me...you know CLO (Collateralized Loan Obligations), private credit, and CRE (Commercial Real Estate) loans. Search @beskar_capital and CRE for past posts for details.

So what should I do now? I don't normally give advice, rather show followers my tools, how they work, and how to fish for yourself. But in my mission to help young people that have no clue what deep recession looks like, I am giving advice below. YOU decide if you want to act on it:

(1) YOU are about to get absolutely HAMMERED with Home Equity Loan offers, personal loan offers, credit limit increase offers, and auto loan offers. DO NOT DO IT! Unless you are refinancing previous credit debt, absolutely 💯, no way in hell - DO NOT TAKE ON ANY NEW DEBT. NONE!
(2) Mortgage rate offers for new buyers. DO NOT BUY REAL ESTATE - NO LAND, NO HOMES. If you buy property near the peak of a real estate/banking crisis cycle, you will receive a complimentary "SUCKER" button. Any real estate you buy today, on average, will be ~35% cheaper in 2028. Please believe me. Many will be 50% cheaper. I know rents are high. Ride it out. They will start dropping like a rock in early to middle 2026. DO NOT BUY A NEW HOME - no matter what the governments and banks do to entice you. Even if they offer you $25,000 for first time home buyers. DON'T DO IT! It will just get translated into $25,000 in higher home prices that will reset by 2027 anyway. You will just be in the first and earliest group of "suckers" to go in to negative equity. Did I underscore this point enough? 😅
(3)Start getting your body in healthy shape. You know what this means. Eat well. Exercise. Fruits and veggies. We need to build up our mentality to deal with this. If this sounds too kooky for you, just move on. But for those that can consider..JUST DO IT!
(4) Start getting rid of existing debt now. Especially credit debt and debt on depreciating assets. Don't use this newfound stockmarket wealth on new cars, extravagant trips, and other luxury items. Get your debt out first. Instead, let the right stocks at the right TIME keep working for you.
(5) Re-read (1) -(4) above..3 times.

This is not a fear mongering post. If you follow me, you know that I am the biggest bull on Blossom. Look at my portfolio if you don't believe me! 😅🤣😂 THIS is the TIME to buy..and buy speculative..BUT we have to know the hard landing always comes.

title: This Is The Way Series #4A - KTS #9
caption:
First, huge THANK YOU to everyone that participated in this exercise.....learning how to TIME markets using Knowledge Transfer Series tool #9. Go back and read that if you'd like! 😉👍

As you may recall from KTS #38 (How to read the cycle 1 of 3), I presented that in the meltup phase of the cycle, real estate prices continue to ramp up....as we watch for indicators to break down. That is a common focus for Wall Street. There are two components to movement – direction and magnitude.  The first step to TIMING and learning to read the cycle is understanding there is a hierarchy between the two – direction >>> magnitude.  Knowing how to identify directional inflection points is more important than understanding how high/low levels go (magnitude).

This is no different in our technical trading oscillator like RSI. In our exercise, I asked everyone to randomly throw out some stock tickers and their current RSI - without telling why (What a great, diverse set of tickers I received...so thank you again!). By doing this we have a nice statistical data set for observation.

So what did we learn?
@beskar_capital I took each of your stock/etf tickers and punched them into my trading platform to see NOT the magnitude....but the direction of RSI of each of your tickers following the most recent inflection point. 😅👍

Here's what I found:

93 of the 99 tickers, or 94%, are either OVERSOLD (< 30) or their RSI is rising. 94% !?!?!?!?

That means of all of the stocks and ETFs you provided, NEARLY ALL OF THEM ARE NEAR-TERM BUYS !!!!

The exceptions?

$FCEL
$HDGE
$MNST
$PEP
$TMF
$X

The point of this exercise wasn't to stump to find an exception, rather, let's pull a random sample of tickers and see if now is a TIME to SELL.....or a TIME to BUY?

Typically, it takes anywhere from 2 weeks to 2 months to move from an OVERSOLD market to an OVERBOUGHT market, and vice versa.

So with the results above - where do you think the market is headed over the next couple of weeks? 😂

Just for additional support, I decided to step back in Beskar fashion....to check the OB/OS oscillator (RSI-based) on the 11 Sectors and the $SPY (S&P500 ETF).

Guess what? 9 of 11 Sectors , or 82%, are OVERSOLD ($XLU and $XLP exceptions) and/or rising RSI. The $SPY ? Rising RSI from just outside OVERSOLD. 😂

Next up...the 21 Subsectors? Survey says? 21 of 21, or 100%, of ALL Subsectors are OVERSOLD or rising RSI.

How about one more check? This check is a secret list that I will bring out in the Knowledge Transfer Series when the TIME is right. It is the 50 best tickers to trade options! 😃😄👍🤑😉 (Stay tuned in to KTS!). And the results? 46 of 50, or 92%, are either buried near the OVERSOLD inflection point or are rising in RSI.

title: This Is The Way #3A - KTS #9
caption:
First, huge THANK YOU to everyone that participated in this exercise.....learning how to TIME markets using Knowledge Transfer Series tool #9. Go back and read that if you'd like! 😉👍

As you may recall from KTS #38 (How to read the cycle 1 of 3), I presented that in the meltup phase of the cycle, real estate prices continue to ramp up....as we watch for indicators to break down. That is a common focus for Wall Street. There are two components to movement – direction and magnitude.  The first step to TIMING and learning to read the cycle is understanding there is a hierarchy between the two – direction >>> magnitude.  Knowing how to identify directional inflection points is more important than understanding how high/low levels go (magnitude).

This is no different in our technical trading oscillator like RSI. In our exercise, I asked everyone to randomly throw out some stock tickers and their current RSI - without telling why (What a great, diverse set of tickers I received...so thank you again!). By doing this we have a nice statistical data set for observation.

So what did we learn? @beskar_capital took each of your stock/etf tickers and punched them into my trading platform to see NOT the magnitude....but the direction of RSI of each of your tickers following the most recent inflection point. 😅👍

Here's what I found:

125 of the 132 tickers, or 95%, are either OVERBOUGHT (>70) or their RSI is declining. 95% !?!?!?!?

That means of all of the stocks and ETFs you provided, NEARLY ALL OF THEM ARE NEAR-TERM SELLS !!!!

The exceptions?

-K DAWG gave $VLO , $PSX, and $ORLY
-Connor gave $CIA.TO and $DRX.TO
-Kirk gave $SPRY
-Rehan gave NOA.TO

The point of this exercise wasn't to stump to find an exception, rather, let's pull a random sample of tickers and see if now is a TIME to BUY.....or a TIME to SELL?

Typically, it takes anywhere from 2 weeks to 2 months to move from an OVERBOUGHT market to an OVERSOLD market, and vice versa.

So with the results above - where do you think the market is headed over the next couple of weeks? 😂

Just for additional support, I decided to step back in Beskar fashion....to check the OB/OS oscillator (RSI-based) on the 11 Sectors and the $SPY (S&P500 ETF).

Guess what? All 11 Sectors , or 100%, are OVERBOUGHT and/or declining RSI. The $SPY ? Buried OVERBOUGHT. 😂

Next up...the 21 Subsectors? Survey says? 21 of 21, or 100%, of ALL Subsectors are OVERBOUGHT or declining RSI. In fact only $XNTK, $XTL, and $XOP are declining RSI outside of the OVERBOUGHT (>70) threshold. They will be the first ones to turn up in a couple of weeks as the others are buried in the OVERBOUGHT zone.

How about one more check? This check is a secret list that I will bring out in the Knowledge Transfer Series when the TIME is right. It is the 50 best tickers to trade options! 😃😄👍🤑😉 (Stay tuned in to KTS!). And the results? 47 of 50, again 94%, are either buried near the OVERBOUGHT inflection point or are declining in RSI.

Keep in mind the markets will speak to the Fed......and those greedy wolves don't want a mere 25 basis point rate cut....those ravenous beasts want to pressure them for 0.5 %. How do you think they might go about doing that? Yep, you got it. They will SELL it off - all the TIME staying within their normal trading range of ebb and flow within the natural cycle.

title: Is this a lot of Money????
caption:
Print

UPDATE 2-TD Bank sets aside $2.6 bln more for US anti-money laundering penalties, lowers Schwab stake

6:28pm ET, 08/21/2024 - Reuters

(Recasts, writes through)

By Nivedita Balu and Manya Saini

TORONTO, Aug 21 (Reuters) - Canada's TD Bank Group said it would set aside $2.6 billion more for penalties related to U.S. regulatory probes into deficiencies in its anti-money laundering program and it would sell part of its stake in Charles Schwab to offset the financial impact.

In anticipation of a global resolution to the anti-money laundering (AML) probes by year-end, which will include monetary and non-monetary penalties, the lender has now set aside a total of over $3 billion, including a $450 million provision it took in April.

The U.S. regulatory probes relate to allegations that Chinese drug traffickers used the bank to launder at least $650 million from 2016 through 2021 and an employee took a bribe to facilitate laundering of drug money.

TD said it would sell 40.5 million Charles Schwab shares, cutting its ownership in the U.S. brokerage down to 10.1% from 12.3%. The shares had a market value of $2.6 billion based on the closing price on Wednesday.

"We recognize the seriousness of our U.S. AML program deficiencies and the work required to meet our obligations and responsibilities is of paramount importance," TD CEO Bharat Masrani said in a statement. "Our remediation program is well underway. TD has strengthened its U.S. AML program."

Masrani and other executives will take questions from analysts on Thursday after the lender reports third-quarter earnings.

"While the market now has certainty surrounding the amount of the charge, this is offset by the fact that it is larger than expectations and the impact this has on capital," Jefferies analyst John Aiken said.

The U.S. regulatory probes were announced shortly after TD terminated its planned $13.4 billion purchase of U.S. regional bank First Horizon.

The deal would have grown TD's retail presence in the U.S. southeast and added about 400 branches in the country, a key part of its growth strategy as it seeks opportunities beyond its home market.

Since disclosing the probes last year, the bank has spent $500 million to tighten its AML program and risk controls, hired several key executives and invested in staff training programs.

"TD Bank is not out of the woods yet," said Sean Parker, a senior adviser with consultancy firm AML Shop in Toronto. U.S. regulators including the Treasury Department's Financial Crimes Enforcement Network and the Department of Justice would "test" the bank to ensure there is a culture shift towards compliance, he said.

TD's capital ratio, a key measure of a bank's health, will take a 35 basis points hit in the fourth fiscal quarter due to operational risk and will get a 54 basis points advantage due to the Schwab share sale, it said.

The capital ratio, or CET1 ratio, stood at 12.8% as of July 31, 2024, well above the Canadian banking regulator's requirement. (Reporting by Nivedita Balu in Toronto and Manya Saini in Bengaluru; Editing by Shilpi Majumdar and Jamie Freed)

(0413-2246)

title: Knowledge Transfer Series #42 - Warrant for Arrest
caption:
Be still my beating heart! ❤️

Those that have been following - and reading 😅 - the Knowledge Transfer Series know that we can TIME markets to realize absolutely amazing double-digit annualized returns. You also know by now that the meltup phase of the real estate/banking crisis cycle has entered stage 2 (liftoff) where speculation, panic, government intervention, geopolitical turmoil, and greed begin to hit a fevered pitch. So much so that the calendar year 2025 will bring the most amazing stock market returns that most young people on this site could never possibly imagine.

Simply put, in the MOST PREDICTABLE fashion, central banks around the world that have been stockpiling GOLD for years now, start tinkering with trying to "fix" the real estate/banking crisis cycle.....which only serves to establish the 2nd stage of the meltup in markets and real estate prices. What happens next is a massive pour of liquidity into a financial system that is already red hot 🥵 🔥 with record levels of private credit. Ohhhhhh sshhhiiitt!

So hey economies with your rising GDPs..get ready for interest rate cuts, Kamala's pledge to build 3 million homes to increase supply inventory....or her offering $25,000 to any SUCKER willing to purchase a home at the near peak of real estate prices, or Trump's calls for tariffs? ....and tax cuts? Wrong TIME politicians!!!

So markets?: buckle up - we are going to the moon...for now. 🤑
So for real estate prices?: TIME to re-accelerate into a peak 5-7 quarters from now...before...🤢

So the TIIME is right for @beskar_capitalto start buying WARRANTS. Wait....what's that?

Warrants are practically BUY CALL LEAPs, which- if you follow me - you know I am a fan of. Please re-read KTS #30 again before proceeding! And if you missed Options Week on KTS, read Knowledge Transfer Series #30 thru #36A for a layman education to demystify options! 😂

Warrants give you, the investor, the right to buy the underlying stock at a fixed price (called an exercise price) set by the company at the TIME they are issued. Most stocks don't issue Warrants. And those that do set that price at different levels. Some at $5, $35, or even $100. But the beauty of Warrants is that they trade at low prices like penny stocks - NO, I'm serious, sometimes for just pennies. So when these move from 1 cent to 2 cents, that's 100% return.

Eeeehhhhh. This sounds crazy risky..besides, I thought you have a longer term investment horizon, Beskar?

Well, it's true, companies do issue these to raise capital outside of traditional share issuance or loan agreements - and often in turnaround or startup stuations where investors are compelled to purchase for future return.
So, it is viewed as riskier - because they do expire on a certain date. But just like a call LEAP, that date is ffffaaarrrr out in the future. So for those that have the ability to successfully TIME the markets, this can be an amazing investment vehicle. Especially since as the underlying stock moves upward, the Warrants will too. And just like shares, Warrants trade on the open market. So you can easily buy/sell any amount of Warrants (your right to buy shares at the set price before the expiration date).

Warrants can deliver returns you could never ever imagine. And there are times - most of the time, in fact - that I wouldn't even think of buying them.

But for the RIGHT STOCKS at the RIGHT TIME? It is definitely worth the risk TO BUY A VERY SMALL PORTION OF YOUR PORTFOLIO IN WARRANTS and BUY CALL LEAPs. The beauty about Warrants is that I can invest very small amounts (say ~$150) and realize hundreds of percentage points in returns over the next 5-7 quarters. It can literally turn into $150,000 (1,000x).

And now is that TIME. Why? Because we know how to read the real estate/banking crisis cycle. Here's how I consider Warrants to purchase:

(1) Companies whose stocks perform well in the 2nd stage of the meltup phase of a real estate/banking crisis cycle. Those that follow me know..I choose SELECT commodities that will do well by monitoring money flows. There are many other sectors as well..I just go for the highest return sectors. 😉👍

(2) preference to stocks with Warrants with a maturity (expiration date) in the first half of 2026 - so we can capture all of 2025 - the year of the bull in this decade - for those of us that know how to TIME markets 😂🤣😅 within our "rights" range.

(3) Preference for low- priced Warrants. In the irrational, crazy, overspeulative markets that are coming, getting in early on these before it ramps is ideal. A 20 cent warrant moving to $1.00 in no time at all is completely possible.

Now, did you know that Warren Buffett held Warrants in $OXY for some time? So before you Conventionalists come in and start giving Yoda lessons on how to invest like the greatest, research your admired hedge fund managers and ask yourself why they never told you about it?

title: Knowledge Transfer Series #37-Step Back, LT Trend
caption:
For those that follow me, you are now well aware of my magnetism to longer-dated charts ((KTS # 15, #22, #29). Of course we identify stock candidates through fundamental analysis (KTS #17) and track their business (KTS #28). And when it comes to stock price movements, we are constantly monitoring the money flows (KTS #25) of those early INSIDERS (KTS #11, 14, 19, and #20) so we can consistently outperform our fellow INVESTORS (KTS #11).

But my guiding light is to always be able to identify the point in the real estate/banking crisis cycle (first post, "They are telling us so what are you waiting for " in March 2024) and position accordingly. Now that we have fully confirmed the next stage (KTS #18) of the meltup phase, we can build our options (options week: KTS #30 thru #36) ability - 20 paper trades first! 😁

I saved today's tool for an elevator drop period in stock markets like today after a big run up. What's the tool @beskar_capital ? - because I need it quick!!!! Ok, ok. I get it.

It's Bollinger Bands.

What!?!?! My portfolio is dropping like a rock and you give me Bollinger Bands!?!?!

Bollinger bands establish a typical trading range for a stock based on standard deviations relative to a longer trend, which allows us to assess near term price volatility. Ugh.

So in a simple way, the current stock price - OF ANY STOCK - is bouncing in a defined range relative to it's long-term trend. So when the stock price is trading near its upper band, it is setting up to retrace back to its longer-term trend. Conversely, when it trades near its lower Bollinger band, it is setting up for a near term rally back up to its long term-trend. So identifying the long-term trendline is key. AT ALL TIMES It is either rising, falling, or moving sideways specific to each stock. So what's key to monitor is which category the long-term trend is in: rising, falling, or sideways. And guess what determines this for each given stock? Forward earnings estimates driven by company guidance, or FUNDAMENTALS. 😁👍 So as you develop your understanding of where we are in the real estate/banking crisis cycle..and STEPPING BACK by constantly identifying the direction of the long-term trend, you can use this tool to check your emotions at the door..and use your insight to make TIMELY investment decisions. 😄👍

Ok, so where do I get these Bollinger Bands and what's the long-term trend line? I recommend the 200-day Double-Exponential Moving Average as the long-term trendline. Then add the Bollinger bands. All of this can be done within your trading platform. If the case that it isn't there as an option to view (highly doubtful but these Canadian platforms have really surprised me before in lack of functionality) , you may want to find it for free out in the internet.

Homework TIME! 😅

Why not take all of the stocks in your portfolio and categorize them into one of 3 categories for the LT trendline?: (1) rising, (2) falling, and (3) sideways.

Maybe get a little geeky and enter them into a spreadsheet! 😂

Now add the Bollinger Bands and see if we are near the upper band? the lower band?, or right near the long-term trendline?

It's important to understand what's going on in the markets right now and keep your emotions in check. But -it requires stepping back and understanding the long-term trend with respect to the cadence of the real estate /banking crisis cycle.

YTD, the markets have made a big run up..and now the markets - and specifically the stocks within them - are all in the volatile process of trying to find their LT trendline. Naturally, margin calls, panic, and rebalancing amid dramatic drops (emotions) will overshoot both above and below the LT trendline. It gets especially complicated that we are in the middle of earnings season..so new guidance on earnings can move the LT trendline. But that's the key...is the LT trendline changing direction (whether reversing up, down, or breaking from sideways).

Below are some facts where things currently stand:

- We are still firmly in the meltup phase of the real estate/banking crisis cycle.
- Sharp drops over short periods of TIME are very common for healthy meltup phase climbs. Typically 4-6% as earlier this year, but corrections 10%+) are common too in the meltup phase.
- GDP was just increased in the U.S. and worldwide - economies are RECOVERING.
- Currency inflection points like the dollar:yen are fueling the irrationality, cause margin calls on traders borrowing to bet forex. Japan is strengthening their currency with interest rate increases which is putting pressure on the USD currency strength and dominance..and the US is being pressured to cut to make the dollar even weaker.
- This morning Wall St issued 140 price target raises, 79 cuts. Nearly 2:1. 😂

It IS TIME to invest in the RIGHT stocks at the RIGHT TIME. But this market will likely bottom out sometime this week.

Step back, find the LT trend

This is the Way! 😁👍

title: SELL COVERED CALL OPTION UPDATE FROM KTS #36A
caption:
OK. This is an update on the covered call option that we SOLD to OPEN in Knowledge Transfer Series #36A. Reread #36A to get brought up to speed.

This is what we said about the covered call when we opened it last week:

SELL COVERED CALL: $PATH @ $12.50 strik; 8/9/2024, $0.41 premium, or $41 (100 shares per contract remember? KTS #32).

So, this is what happens, I, as the seller of this COVERED CALL option, get PAID $41 🤑 for holding 100 shares of the stock (it'salready in my portfolio), which, by taking his money....I am giving him the right (the buyer) to buy 100 shares of $PATH for $12.50 per share an any time between right now and August 9th. If the stock doesn't get above $13 before then, it won't make sense for the buyer to exercise the contract. Why? Because he's already $0.41 in premium + $12.50 strike = $12.91 share price breakeven.

So now we both sit and wait. I win $41 if the $PATH stock price doesn't rise above $13 before August 9th. He wins the ability to buy 100 shares of PATH for $12.50 - before August 9th -if it rises above $13.00 before then.

I obviously don't think there's any catalyst between now and then to propel this stock upward. So I hold 100 shares of this stock anyway......might as well "create" an instant "dividend" of $41 for myself while we wait for the next earnings report! 😄👍🤑

So fast forward to today. My coupon (contract) is going for $0.11, or $11 (remember 100 shares per contract, so 100 x $0.11 = $ 11 😁👍). With plenty of liquidity (short-dated option in popular underlying ticker), I could easily BUY to CLOSE my coupon (covered call contact) that a week ago I SOLD to OPEN (above).

Again, I received $41 when I sold the coupon. Right this second, I could buy it back for $11, netting a profit of $30 .....without any of my underlying shares in PATH being called away! That was an easy $30 out of thin air! 😅🤣😂

Imagine if I had 10 of those coupons (contracts).....that would be $300 income ...... and I take those rights back to buy my shares of UIPATH for $12.50 per share - which of course the buyer wouldn't dare do since his Breakeven Price is $12.91.

Well, I am going to BUY the coupon back today for $11 on this down day and lock in $30 of income and have a nice lunch! 😉

But if I was feeling a bit greedy and I wanted to get the FULL $41 by letting the coupon (contract) expire (unexercised, meaning the buyer never calls for buying my shares). I still don't think there's any positive catalyst coming that can propel that stock price above $13 (based on above rationale) between now and August 9th. But the market is likely to rebound come August 5th (KTS #??) - four days before my coupon (contract) expires - so I'll part with it now. 😉

So see how you can profit off stocks you hold already? See how options can act as insurance for your portfolio?

One week....$30 cash......for doing nothing than what I'd do anyway.....hold my stocks. 😅

REMEMBER, NO UNcovered CALLS....NEVER EVER!

Practice 20 trades on paper and follow others.

I told you this would be fun.

This is the Way! 😎 🏄‍♂️ 🌊 🏄‍♀️

This is how you can juice your returns.

See attached table. I reviewed they flyer (Options "chain") of available contracts to "write" (covered call to sell).

Review and ask any questions. Picked expirations before the next earnings report. Picked strike prices above and below the current market price.

Hmmm. I'll go with the one highlighted in GREEN:

SELL COVERED CALL: $PATH @ $12.50 strik; 8/9/2024, $0.41 premium, or $41 (100 shares per contract remember? KTS #32).

So, this is what happens, I, as the seller of this COVERED CALL option, get PAID $41 🤑 for holding 100 shares of the stock (it'salready in my portfolio), which, by taking his money....I am giving him the right (the buyer) to buy 100 shares of $PATH for $12.50 per share an any time between right now and August 9th. If the stock doesn't get above $13 before then, it won't make sense for the buyer to exercise the contract. Why? Because he's already $0.41 in premium + $12.50 strike = $12.91 share price breakeven.

So now we both sit and wait. I win $41 if it doesn't rise above $13 before August 9th. He wins the ability to buy 100 shares of PATH for $12.50 - before August 9th -if it rises above $13.00 before then.

I obviously don't think there's any catalyst between now and then to propel this stock upward. So I hold 100 shares of this stock anyway......might as well "create" an instant "dividend" of $41 for myself while we wait for the next earnings report! 😄👍🤑

title: Knowledge Transfer Series #36-Selling Call Options
caption:
This week is Options week in the Knowledge Transfer Series where we aim to demystify the basic types of options in the options market for benefits - whether we choose to engage in it..... or not.

These final 2 options posts (KTS #36/36A) build off the previous posts KTS #30, 31, 32, 33, 33A, 34, 34A,35, and 35A, leading up to this which must be read prior to reading #36/36A for context and completeness.

Wrapping up with SELLING COVERED CALLS. Notice I added the word "COVERED", which means you already own enough shares to COVER a CALL option contract you SELL.

Reminder: @beskar_capital will NEVER - AS IN EVER - SUGGEST, RECOMMEND, OR INFER - IN ANY WAY - FOR ANYONE - to participate, in any way, direct or indirect, in SELLING UNCOVERED CALLS. Selling UNCOVERED CALL Options is risky and you can lose your shirt, your house, and your life. 😪 It's true, many have done so when they've realized there is no way out. So NEVER any UNCOVERED CALLS!!!

That was a lawyerly enough disclaimer, right?

But don't let this scary warning discourage you from SELLING COVERED CALLS. It really is a great way to generate income for your portfolio!

HOW IT WORKS:
You, the seller of a covered call option coupon (contract), receive a premium (get paid 🤑) by giving the buyer of the covered call contract the right to BUY YOUR EXISTING SHARES at a set price (strike) before expiration.

WHEN TO DO IT:
(1) When you want to generate income for your portfolio.

(2) When you hold at least 100 shares of a company to COVER your obligation to deliver on 1 contract (each contract represents 100 shares, remember? KTS #32). So SELLING 2 COVERED CALL contracts, you need to always maintain 200 shares of the underlying stock, get it? 5 contracts needs 500 shares, etc.

(3) Great for sideway moving stocks!!!! Here the underlying stock just bounces in a relatively narrow range for a long TIME - essentially going nowhere. Thus, the COVERED CALL Option never is exercised (aka coupon never used) and you just keep the premium and the option expires worthless.

(4) Best in either high or low level consolidation.again, sideways moving stocks.

(5) Also ideal when the implied volatility is high and starting to decrease. VIX > 20 is best.

WORST CASE SCENARIO: You get paid upfront but you agreed to sell your shares of a stock you really wanted to keep in exchange for some income because the price goes above the strike price in the contract.

So one of my largest holdings is $ET, a stock currently trading around $16.50 and one that I believe will continue to ascend in its clear 5-year channel.....to at least $24 over TIME. Not the best candidate for selling a covered call option - remember, we like sideways stocks in consolidation for this investment vehicle. BUT, suppose I sold 1 covered call option to get some income on just 100 of my shares (I have A TON of shares of this company). Depending on which expiration date I choose (the further out, longer expirations mean more income), I'll get paid the premium (nice! 😁👍) but if is going to keep climbing like I think it will, it will eventually rise above the strike price (say I picked $20 strike), and my 1 contract of 100 shares will be "called away", and the buyer of the Covered Call will be able to buy the shares at $20.

Here's a COVERED CALL with current pricing showing this:

Sell to Open: $ET @$20 strike, 8/16/24 expiration, $0.38, or $38 (100 shares in each contract = 109 x $0.38 = $38).

If I engage in Selling this Covered Call Option right now, the buyer of the 1 contract pays me $38 - for the right to buy my shares for $20 at any time before August 16th 2024. Since the shares are currently trading in the market for $16.42, USD, it seems likely that the stock won't get above $20?!?!? That's just 23 days from now and the underlying stock would have to move +21.8% from today. While I may want to collect that $38, thinking it's easy money......$ET chart is looking like it's on the verge of yet another leg of breakout.....and they report earnings on August 7th. They've been beating earnings and another good earnings report may just propel the stock up past that $20 strike....BEFORE the contract expires on August 24th?

So, that's the bet. If the stock skyrocketed to $25 per share, you know the buyer of the contract will "call" my 100 shares away by exercising his contract to buy 100 shares at $20. He would then probably immediately sell them and realize a profit of $5 per share, or $500. Definitely would be a great move to buy that coupon (contract) for $38 in premium, right? On the other side of the table, if the stock doesn't go above $20 by August 24th, I just pocket the $38 as the coupon (contract) expires AND I keep holding my 100 shares of ET, which aren't $20 yet..but maybe something like $18. 😁

So you can see why SELLING COVERED CALLS is a fantastic way to generate income.

Candidates presented in KTS #36A next.

This is the Way!

title: Knowledge Transfer Series #35- Selling Put Options
caption:
With relentless fury, @beskar_capital is rolling out the 4 primary options types within 1 week so to keep it cohesive in a way to demystify what appears to be complex.....but really isn't.

This post should be read AFTER reading Knowledge Transfer Series #30, 31, 32, 33, 33A, 34, and 34A. I know that's a lot of prework for those just joining in.....but you can't start watching a movie halfway through it! 😂

Next up? SELLING a PUT OPTION.

Bar none, this is the absolute best way to baby step into options. It is also the most overlooked and unused option type. Especially for more conservative traders/investors. SO IF YOU EVER TRY JUST ONE TYPE OF OPTION, SELLING A PUT OPTION IS THE ONE! 😁👍

HOW DOES IT WORK?

You RECEIVE a premium but you are obligated to purchase the shares at the strike price if it hits before expiration AND you are assigned. What!?!? That's right, you get paid when you SELL a PUT option. You are simply moving to the other side of the table from someone that is buying the Put option (KTS #34/#34A).

What's that part about being "assigned"?
Here's the great part....even if the market price of the underlying stock goes BELOW the strike price that obligated you to buy 100 shares of the stock per contract.....it typically doesn't happen. You only get assigned if the wolf /deer/rabbit on the other side of this contract EXERCISES their contract - which rarely happens. Why? Because most all in the options market are there to just trade paper around to make a quick profits - they don't really want the underlying stock shares changing hands.

Hmmm. OK. This sounds interesting. Go on.

WHEN TO SELL A PUT OPTION:
(1) When you want to get PAID to buy a stock you want to own anyway at a lower price!! What!?!? This is too good to be true? Nope. It's true.
(2) Best TIME to SELL a PUT option is when the underlying stock is entering a period of low level consolidation. So for all of you Blossomers that like buying VALUE stocks that are bottoming and out of favor.....this is a perfect way to get PAID for "knowing" there's a floor in the stock price.
(3) VIX > 20. SELLING PUT options is best during periods of higher volatility! 😉

WORST CASE?:
Even though you receive income (get paid thru the premium paid to you) , you get to buy a stock you want anyway - at a lower price....but it could be more than the current market price. But hey! Most of you like trying to catch those falling knives anyway! 😅🤣😂

With the ongoing tech pullback, there's plenty of candidates to come in and try this......particularly rock star stocks that are getting dragged down with bad news that is stock specific (e.g. $CRWD). So for the Knowledge Transfer Series #35A, I am going to review my grocery flyer for coupons (contracts) to SELL a PUT OPTION. Some good candidates are:

$VRT: Cooling data center partner for Nvidia- those of you that follow me know all about this one.

$S: An undervalued cybersecurity winner

$HSY: Chocolate company that is in consolidation.

$MMM: Longtime out-of-favor company in turnaround.

$JNJ: Value company in consolidation for so.e TIME in a safe sector ahead of the cycle's completion.

Imagine SELLING a PUT Option on $VRT Vertiv Holdings at a strike of $80. I get PAID to buy 100 shares of the stock at $80!??!?! if it drops down that far? I was planning to buy it anyway at $80.......but with SELLING a PUT contract, I get PAID to do it! 🤑

Of course, if it doesn't get down to $80 (really like $78 because it takes a lot for the 🐺 🦊 on the other side of the contract to actually exercise it) I won't get a share assignment..so I'm just left with the income that I get to keep! Poor me. 😅🤣😂

Open your mind. Try it on paper first - 20 trades.

This is the Way.

title: Bought 1 Call TTI @$7.00 1/16/2026 per KTS #33A
caption:
Since Blossom can't record options yet, I am just posting these.

For anyone that has been reading the Knowledge Transfer Series, This is OPTIONS week, where we crank out the how & when on the 4 primary option types.

For those that read KTS #33 / #33A, ON WEDNESDAY....... I placed my BUY to OPEN CALL Option for 1 contract for Tetra Technologies at the $7.00 strike with an expiration of 1/16/2026 with a LIMIT order for $0.40, or, $40 (100 shares, right?)

BOUGHT $TTI 1/16/2026 $7.00 CALL $0.40

So, if you go right now and look at the options chain for TTI at the 1/16/2026 expiration, you will see under the Volume traded...1. That's my order that filled. 😄👍

I want to point out a couple of very, very important points about this order from when it was placed to when it executed:

(1) Remember, this is the shrewd wolf territory. With options , especially, we ALWAYS place LIMIT orders. AVOID ever chasing an options contract higher. With the penny pricing per share rights, the impact inflates.....but hey! that's why we like options in the first place - but we like the inflation in our favor!

(2) I placed this order on Wednesday, right after I posted KTS #33A. Because TTI is in penny stock (<$5) range, there is low liquidity and volumes......especially for a LEAP (expiration date way out in 2026; reference KTS #30). But the order didn't execute until Friday at 3:59 pm, 1 minute before the last trading minute before the weekend! 😂 (Reference KTS #24, Closing TIME). The wolves were trying to bait me into paying more for the option until THEY just gave up! How do I know? Right after I placed the order, the pricing looked like this:

Bid: $0.40 Mid: $0.52 Ask: $0.65

So at that moment, my open order to buy this call option contract saw my offer, 40 cents as the Bid, a willing 🐺 seller at 65 cents, which left the Mid price being automatically calculated as the average of the Bid and Ask. Key point: If I ever decide to change my Bid to the Mid price on an open order, it will usually fill the order. In other words, if I changed my order to $0.52 for 1 contract, or $52 (100 shares in a contract, right?), I likely would have it instantly for $52. Instead, I didn't chase the price up....even though right after I placed my order, the Ask price started to shift around wildly. First the 🐺 lowered the Ask to $0.60....probably hoping I would come up 5 cents as well to 47 cents. See? But I didn't move for the next 2 days as the wolf kept creeping the Ask downward.....basically begging me to come up from my original Bid of 40 cents.

Eventually, the 🐺 gave in and just sold me the contract for 40 cents, my original Bid....and moved on to his/her weekend, in the last minute of the trading day.

The lesson is that it pays to be patient and wait out in that deer stand for days, if necessary. That was 1 contract and I saved $12. But what if I bought 100 contracts (which represents 10,000 shares), that is a difference of $1,200 !?!??! So as you are PAPER TRADING options right now WITHOUT REAL MONEY......play with these Bid/Ask prices to and record the impacts.

Please SPEND THE TIME to learn these tricks now BEFORE you put any of your hard earned capital on the line.

In the end, because options contracts are so volatile compared to stocks, it's possible that my selected TTI contract here above exchanges hands next week for less than 40 cents.
